fields.label: Whitelisted Apps
fields.description: Black or whitelist according to isBlacklist value.

fields.label: Certificate UUID
fields.description: Return unique identifier for domain object.

fields.label: Certificate Subject Uids
fields.description: Prepared for using an Embeddable type if we want to store more metadata than the subject UID in the future.

fields.label: Certificate Common Name
fields.description: This field is abbreviated if the actual value is longer than 512 characters. The field should mostly be used for presentation purpose. For actual logic, is safer to load the data from resource.

fields.label: Certificate Distinguished Name
fields.description: This field is abbreviated if the actual value is longer than 4000 characters. The field should mostly be used for presentation purpose. For actual logic, is safer to load the data from resource.

fields.label: Certificate Organizational Unit
fields.description: This field is abbreviated if the actual value is longer than 512 characters. The field should mostly be used for presentation purpose. For actual logic, is safer to load the data from resource.

fields.label: Certificate Serial Number
fields.description: This field is abbreviated if the actual value is longer than 255 characters. The field should mostly be used for presentation purpose. For actual logic, is safer to load the data from resource. The serial number is stored in decimal format.

fields.label: Certificate Revocation List UUID
fields.description: CRL of this certificate. The value is set once upon creation of the certificate. It is used as part of the URL coded as CRL distribution point. Therefore this is fixed upon certificate generation. Notice, the uuid references the CRL controlling revocation of this certificate. It is not the CRL for issued certificates when this certificate is used a CA.

fields.label: Certificate File UUID
fields.description: Return unique identifier for domain object.

fields.description: Optional. Roles the app has.Apps having certain roles can be exempted from power and background execution restrictions, suspension and hibernation on Android 14 and above. The user control can also be disallowed for apps with certain roles on Android 11 and above. Refer to the documentation of each RoleType for more details. The value may be `null`.

fields.label: Always On VPN App Signing Key Certs
fields.description: Optional. Signing key certificates of the app. This field is required in the following cases: The app has installType set to CUSTOM (i.e. a custom app). The app has roles set to a nonempty list and the app does not exist on the Play Store. The app has extensionConfig set (i.e. an extension app) but ExtensionConfig.signingKeyFingerprintsSha256 (deprecated) is not set and the app does not exist on the Play Store.If this field is not set for a custom app, the policy is rejected. If it is not set when required for a non-custom app, a NonComplianceDetail with. INVALID_VALUE is reported.For other cases, this field is optional and the signing key certificates obtained from Play Store are used. The value may be `null`.

fields.description: Configuration for a custom app (CUSTOM).

fields.description: The app uuid for a native app (CUSTOM).

fields.label: APN Policy
fields.description: Access Point Name (APN) policy. Configuration for Access Point Names (APNs) which may override any other APNs on the device. See OVERRIDE_APNS_ENABLED and overrideApns for details.

fields.label: APN Policy Override APNs
fields.description: Whether override APNs are disabled or enabled. @see DevicePolicyManager.setOverrideApnsEnabled for more details.

fields.label: APN Policy APN Settings
fields.description: APN settings for override APNs. There must not be any conflict between any of the APN settings provided, otherwise the policy will be rejected. Two ApnSettings are considered to conflict when all following fields match on both: `numericOperatorId` `apn` `proxyAddress` `proxyPort` `mmsProxyAddress` `mmsProxyPort` `mmsc` `mvnoType` `protocol` `roamingProtocol` If some of the APN settings result in non-compliance of. INVALID_VALUE, they will be ignored. This can be set on fully managed devices on Android 10 and above. This can also be set on work profiles on Android 13 and above and only with ApnSetting's with ENTERPRISE APN type. A `NonComplianceDetail` with API_LEVEL is reported if the Android version is less than 10. A `NonComplianceDetail` with MANAGEMENT_MODE is reported for work profiles on Android versions less than 13.

fields.label: Device Owner Lock Screen Info
fields.description: Provides a user-facing message with locale info. The maximum message length is 4096 characters.

fields.label: Device Owner Lock Screen Info Localized Messages
fields.description: A map containing locale-message pairs, where locale is a well-formed BCP 47 language code, such as en-US, es-ES, or fr.

fields.label: Device Owner Lock Screen Info Default Message
fields.description: The default message displayed if no localized message is specified or the user's locale doesn't match with any of the localized messages. A default message must be provided if any localized messages are provided.

The app has roles set to a nonempty list and the app does not exist on the Play Store. The app has extensionConfig set (i.e. an extension app) but ExtensionConfig.signingKeyFingerprintsSha256 (deprecated) is not set and the app does not exist on the Play Store.If this field is not set for a custom app, the policy is rejected. If it is not set when required for a non-custom app, a NonComplianceDetail with. INVALID_VALUE is reported.For other cases, this field is optional and the signing key certificates obtained from Play Store are used. The value may be `null`.

fields.label: Start Minutes
fields.description: If the type is WINDOWED, the start of the maintenance window, measured as the number of minutes after midnight in the device's local time. This value must be between 0 and 1439, inclusive.

fields.label: End Minutes
fields.description: If the type is WINDOWED, the end of the maintenance window, measured as the number of minutes after midnight in device's local time. This value must be between 0 and 1439, inclusive. If this value is less than startMinutes, then the maintenance window spans midnight. If the maintenance window specified is smaller than 30 minutes, the actual window is extended to 30 minutes beyond the start time.

fields.label: Freeze Periods
fields.description: An annually repeating time period in which over-the-air (OTA) system updates are postponed to freeze the OS version running on a device. To prevent freezing the device indefinitely, each freeze period must be separated by at least 60 days.

fields.label: Name
fields.description: User friendly name of the wifi configuration.

fields.label: Auto Connect
fields.description: Indicating that the network should be connected to automatically when in range.

fields.label: Hex SSID
fields.description: Hex representation of the network's SSID.

fields.label: Hidden SSID
fields.description: Indicating if the SSID will be broadcast.

fields.label: Passphrase
fields.description: Describes the passphrase for WEP/WPA/WPA2 connections. If WEP-PSK is used, the passphrase must be of the format 0x , where is 40, 104, 128, or 232 bits. The Android Management API only supports 40-bit (10-digit) or 104-bit (26-digit) WEP-PSK passphrases.

fields.label: SSID
fields.description: Property to access the decoded SSID of a network. If this field is set, but HexSSID is not, its value will be UTF-8 encoded and the hex representation will be assigned to HexSSID. To configure a non-UTF-8 SSID, field HexSSID must be used. When reading the configuration of a network, both this field and HexSSID might be set. Then this field is the decoding of HexSSID. If possible the HexSSID is decoded using UTF-8, otherwise an encoding is guessed on a best effort basis.

fields.label: Anonymous Identity
fields.description: For tunneling protocols only, this indicates the identity of the user presented to the outer protocol. This value is subject to string expansions. If not specified, use empty string.

fields.description: CRL of this certificate. The value is set once upon creation of the certificate. It is used as part of the URL coded as CRL distribution point. It is not the CRL for issued certificates when this certificate is used a CA.

fields.label: Domain Suffix Match
fields.description: A collection of acceptable domain suffixes. Values should be valid domain names, e.g. "example.com" or "subdomain.example.com". Enterprise wireless configurations without this field (or with an empty list as value) are considered insecure and rejected by the platform .

fields.label: Identity
fields.description: Identity of user. For tunneling outer protocols (PEAP, EAP-TTLS, and EAP-FAST), this is used to authenticate inside the tunnel, and. AnonymousIdentity is used for the EAP identity outside the tunnel. For non-tunneling outer protocols, this is used for the EAP identity. This value is subject to string expansions.

fields.label: Password
fields.description: Password of user. If not specified, defaults to prompting the user.

fields.label: Server Cape Ms
fields.description: Collection of CA certificates in PEM format, used to verify the host's certificate chain. If this collection contains entries, `serverCARefs` must be empty.

fields.label: Server CA Refs
fields.description: Collection of CA certificate references, used for verifying the host's certificate chain. At least one of the CA certificates must match. Cannot be set at the same time as `serverCAPEMs`. If the collection is empty, the client does not check whether server certificate are signed by a specific CA. A verification using the system’s CA certificates may still apply. See UseSystemCAs for this.

fields.label: Subject Match
fields.description: A substring which a remote RADIUS service certificate subject name must contain in order to connect.

fields.label: Subject Alternative Name Match
fields.description: A list of alternative subject names to be matched against the alternative subject name of an authentication server certificate.

fields.label: Use Proactive Key Caching
fields.description: Indicates whether Proactive Key Caching (also known as Opportunistic Key Caching) should be used on a per-service basis.

DNS Settings Server Addresses
fields.description: An unordered list of DNS server IP address strings. These IP addresses can be a mixture of IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.

fields.label: DNS Settings Server Name
fields.description: The hostname of a DNS-over-TLS server used to validate the server certificate, as defined in RFC 7858. If no serverAddresses are provided, the hostname will be used to determine the server addresses. This key must be present only if the DNSProtocol is TLS.

fields.label: DNS Settings Server URL
fields.description: The URI template of a DNS-over-HTTPS server, as defined in RFC 8484. This URL must use the https:// scheme, and the hostname or address in the URL will be used to validate the server certificate. If no serverAddresses are provided, the hostname or address in the URL will be used to determine the server addresses. This key must be present only if the DNSProtocol is HTTPS.

fields.label: DNS Settings Supplemental Match Domains
fields.description: A list of domain strings used to determine which DNS queries will use the DNS server. If this array is not provided, all domains will use the DNS server. A single wildcard * prefix is supported, but is not required. For example, both *.example.com and example.com match against mydomain.example.com and your.domain.example.com, but do not match against mydomain-example.com.

fields.label: Prohibit Disablement
fields.description: If `true`, prohibits users from disabling DNS settings. This key is only available on supervised devices. Default: false.

fields.label: Denied Bundle Identifiers
fields.description: An array of bundle identifiers of apps that don’t use SSO provided by this extension. Available in iOS 15 and later, and macOS 12 and later.

fields.label: Extension Data
fields.description: A dictionary of arbitrary data passed through to the app extension.

fields.label: Extension Identifier
fields.description: The bundle identifier of the app extension that performs SSO for the specified URLs (Required) .

fields.label: Hosts
fields.description: An array of host or domain names that apps can authenticate through the app extension. Required for Credential payloads. Ignored for Redirect payloads. The system: Matches host or domain names case-insensitively Requires that all the host and domain names of all installed Extensible SSO payloads are unique Note: Host names that begin with a “.” are wildcard suffixes that match all subdomains; otherwise the host name needs be an exact match.

fields.label: Platform SSO Account Display Name
fields.description: The display name for the account in notifications and authentication requests.

fields.label: Platform SSO Additional Groups
fields.description: The list of created groups that don’t have administrator access.

fields.label: Platform SSO Administrator Groups
fields.description: The list of groups to use for administrator access. The system requests membership during authentication.

fields.label: Platform SSO Authorization Groups
fields.description: The pairing of Authorization Rights to group names. The system updates the Authorization Right to use the group when used.

fields.label: Platform SSO Enable Authorization
fields.description: Enables using identity provider accounts at authorization prompts. Requires that UseSharedDeviceKeys is true. The system assigns groups using AdministratorGroups, AdditionalGroups, or AuthorizationGroups.

fields.label: Platform SSO Enable Create User At Login
fields.description: Enables creating new users at the login window with an AuthenticationMethod of either Password or SmartCard. Requires that UseSharedDeviceKeys is true.

fields.label: Platform SSO Login Frequency
fields.description: The duration, in seconds, until the system requires a full login instead of a refresh. The default value is 64,800 (18 hours). The minimum value is 3600 (1 hour).

fields.label: Platform SSO New User Authorization Mode
Platform SSO Token To User Mapping
Platform SSO Token To User Mapping Account Name
fields.description: The claim name to use for the user’s account name.

fields.label: Platform SSO Token To User Mapping Full Name
fields.description: The claim name to use for the user’s full name.

fields.label: Platform SSO Use Shared Device Keys
fields.description: If true, the system uses the same signing and encryption keys for all users.

fields.label: Platform SSO FileVault Policy
fields.description: The policy to apply when using Platform SSO at FileVault unlock on Apple Silicon Macs. Applies when. AuthenticationMethod is Password. Available in macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Platform SSO Login Policy
fields.description: The policy to apply when using Platform SSO at the login window. Applies when AuthenticationMethod is Password. Available in macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Platform SSO Unlock Policy
fields.description: The policy to apply when using Platform SSO at screensaver unlock. Applies when AuthenticationMethod is Password. Available in macOS 15 and later.

fields.label: Platform SSO Offline Grace Period
fields.description: The amount of time after the last successful Platform SSO login a local account password can be used offline. Required when 'AllowOfflineGracePeriod' is set.

fields.label: Platform SSO Authentication Grace Period
fields.description: The amount of time after a 'FileVaultPolicy', 'LoginPolicy', or 'UnlockPolicy' is received or updated that unregistered local accounts can be used. Required when 'AllowAuthenticationGracePeriod' is set.

fields.label: Platform SSO Non Platform SSO Accounts
fields.description: The list of local accounts that are not subject to the 'FileVaultPolicy', 'LoginPolicy', or 'UnlockPolicy'. The accounts are also not prompted to register for Platform SSO.

fields.label: Realm
fields.description: The realm name for Credential payloads. Use proper capitalization for this value. Ignored for Redirect payloads.

fields.label: Registration Token
fields.description: The token this device uses for registration with Platform SSO. Use it for silent registration with the Identity. Provider. Requires that AuthenticationMethod isn’t empty. Available in macOS 13 and later.

fields.label: Team Identifier
fields.description: The team identifier of the app extension. This key is required on macOS and ignored elsewhere.

fields.label: Urls
fields.description: An array of URL prefixes of identity providers where the app extension performs SSO. Required for Redirect payloads. Ignored for Credential payloads. The URLs need to begin with http:// or https://. The system: Matches scheme and host name case-insensitively Does not allow query parameters and URL fragments Requires that the URLs of all installed Extensible SSO payloads are unique .

fields.label: Calculator Basic Mode
fields.description: If present, configures the basic mode of the calculator. Basic mode is always enabled.

fields.label: Calculator Basic Mode Add Square Root
Calculator Input Modes
fields.description: If present, controls global input options of the calculator. If not present, all input modes are enabled.

fields.label: Calculator Math Notes Mode
fields.description: If present, configures the Math Notes mode of the calculator. If not present, Math Notes mode is enabled.

fields.label: Calculator Programmer Mode
fields.description: If present, configures the programmer mode of the calculator. If not present, programmer mode is enabled.

fields.label: Calculator Scientific Mode
fields.description: If present, configures the scientific mode of the calculator. If not present, scientific mode is enabled.

fields.label: System Behavior
fields.description: If present, configures math behavior in the system.

fields.label: Raw Content
fields.description: The xml payload content of the configuration. Will be parsed and validated each time the configuration is updated.

fields.label: Payload Content
fields.description: Holds the parsed "PayloadContent" of rawContent.

fields.label: Second Level Payload Type
fields.description: The payload type of the content, will be identified by parsing the content. Will be used as return type of getType(). Needs to be stored as separate property. Simply adding a "setType" will not persist the value in the resulting json, as the "type" property is already used to determine the. JsonSubType.

fields.label: Notification Settings
fields.description: An array of notification settings dictionaries (required).

fields.label: New Tab Start Page
fields.description: Sets the start page for new tabs in Safari.

fields.label: New Tab Start Page Extension Identifier
New Tab Start Page Homepage URL
New Tab Start Page Page Type
Automatic Actions
fields.description: This object configures various automatic Software Update functionality.

fields.label: Beta
fields.description: Note: only allow configuring "allowed" or "always off" for now. The other beta options require integration to retrieve seeding service tokens from ASM/ASB, which is not supported at this moment.

fields.label: Deferrals
fields.description: The object that configures update deferrals.

fields.label: Rapid Security Response
fields.description: These configurations set user access to interacting with Background Security Improvement.

fields.label: Time Zone
fields.description: The Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA) time zone database name. If forceAutomaticDateAndTime or forceAutomaticDateAndTime is set, this setting fails with an error. Otherwise, setting this value disables automatic time zone logic. The user can still change the time zone by, for example, switching automatic date and time back on. The intention is to allow setting the time zone when automatic determination is not available, e.g. when location services are disabled.

fields.label: Login Screen Domain Auto Complete
fields.description: Determines whether the domain name is autocompleted on the sign-in screen of a managed ChromeOS device. Default value: false.

fields.label: Login Screen Domain Auto Complete Prefix
fields.description: Autocomplete domain prefix. Specifies the domain name to autocomplete on a managed ChromeOS device. Dependencies: loginScreenDomainAutoComplete: true .

fields.label: Device Login Screen Auto Select Certificate For Urls
fields.description: Automatically select client certificate for these single sign-on sites. Please refer to the support url for the format of this setting.

fields.label: Device Login Screen Privacy Screen Enabled
Device Login Screen Prompt On Multiple Matching Certificates
fields.description: Controls whether the user is prompted to select a client certificate on the sign-in screen whenever the auto-selection policy matches multiple certificates. Default value: false.

fields.label: Device Login Screen System Info Enforced
Login Screen Keyboard Focus Highlight Enabled
Show User Names
fields.description: Sign-in screen name and photo visibility. Controls whether the sign-in screen shows names and photos of previously signed in users on managed ChromeOS devices. Default value: true.

fields.label: Login Screen Primary Mouse Button Switch
Login Screen Select To Speak Enabled
Allow For Chrome Devices
fields.description: Chromebooks (by device). Allow managed devices to use the ethernet network. Default value: false.

fields.label: Allow For Chrome Users
fields.description: Chromebooks (by user). Allow managed users to use the ethernet network. Default value: false.

fields.label: Details Authentication
fields.description: Authentication. Sets the authentication type of the ethernet network. Required fields: For values: 8021X; Required: eap.outerProtocol .

fields.label: Details EAP Outer Protocol
fields.description: Outer protocol. Sets the outer extensible authentication protocol. Required fields: For values: PEAP; Required: innerProtocol, useSystemCas. For values: EAP-TLS; Required: tlsVersionMax, useSystemCas For values: EAP-TTLS; Required: innerProtocol, useSystemCas .

fields.label: Details EAP Inner Protocol
fields.description: Inner protocol. Sets the inner extensible authentication protocol. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS .

fields.label: Details EAP Use System Cas
fields.description: Allows using Server Certificate Authorities. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TLS outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS .

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Enrollment Urls
fields.description: Client enrollment URLs. Set the client enrollment URLs of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer
Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer Common Name
fields.description: Common name. Sets the common name of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer Locality
fields.description: Locality. Sets the locality of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer Organization
fields.description: Organization. Sets the organization of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer Organizational Unit
fields.description: Organizational unit. Sets the organizational unit of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject
Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject Common Name
fields.description: Common name. Sets the common name of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject Locality
fields.description: Locality. Sets the locality of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject Organization
fields.description: Organization. Sets the organization of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject Organizational Unit
fields.description: Organizational unit. Sets the organizational unit of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Identity
fields.description: Username. Sets the username of the EAP. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: LEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TLS outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS outerProtocol: EAP-PWD .

fields.label: Details EAP Password
fields.description: Password. Sets the password of the EAP. Omit from requests to retain current value, set to "" to clear the value. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: LEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS outerProtocol: EAP-PWD .

fields.label: Details EAP Anonymous Identity
fields.description: Outer identity. Sets the outer identity of the EAP. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS .

fields.label: Details EAP TLS Version Max
fields.description: Maximum TLS version. Sets the maximum TLS version of the EAP. Dependencies: outerProtocol: EAP-TLS .

fields.label: Details EAP Server CA Ref
fields.description: Server Certificate Authority. Sets the Server Certificate Authority. Dependencies: useSystemCas: false .

fields.label: Details EAP Domain Suffix Match
fields.description: Server certificate domain suffix match. Sets constraints on the suffix of the domain name in server certificate. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TLS outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS .

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Type
fields.description: Proxy Type. Sets the proxy type of the network. Required fields: For values: Manual; Required: manualConfiguration. For values: PAC; Required: automaticProxyConfigurationUrl .

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration HTTP Proxy
Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration HTTP Proxy Host
fields.description: Host. Sets the host of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration HTTP Proxy Port
fields.description: Port. Sets the port of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Secure HTTP Proxy
Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Secure HTTP Proxy Host
fields.description: Host. Sets the host of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Secure HTTP Proxy Port
fields.description: Port. Sets the port of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Ftp Proxy
Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Ftp Proxy Host
fields.description: Host. Sets the host of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Ftp Proxy Port
fields.description: Port. Sets the port of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Socks
Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Socks Host
fields.description: Host. Sets the host of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Socks Port
fields.description: Port. Sets the port of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Exclude Domains
fields.description: Domains with no proxy. Sets the domains with no proxy in manual proxy configuration. Dependencies: type: Manual .

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Automatic Proxy Configuration URL
fields.description: Autoconfiguration URL. Sets the autoconfiguration URL in automatic proxy configuration. Dependencies: type: PAC .

fields.label: Details Allow IP Configuration
fields.description: IP settings. Allow IP address to be configured on the device (ChromeOS only).

fields.label: Details Allow Name Servers Configuration
fields.description: Allow name servers to be configured on the device.

fields.label: Details Custom Name Servers
fields.description: Custom name servers. Sets domain values in custom name servers. Dependencies: nameServerSelection: NAME_SERVERS_ENUM_CUSTOM .

fields.label: Details Name
fields.description: Name. Ethernet network name.

fields.label: Avatar UUID
fields.description: Return unique identifier for domain object.

fields.label: Custom Terms Of Service UUID
fields.description: Return unique identifier for domain object.

fields.label: Custom Terms Of Service Content Type
Custom Terms Of Service Modification Date
Device Restricted Managed Guest Session Enabled
fields.description: Enables Imprivata restricted managed guest session mode. Default value: false.

fields.label: Auto Launch Delay Seconds
fields.description: Auto-launch delay. Number of seconds to delay before launching the managed guest session. During this time the sign-in screen will be visible. Default value: 0 Dependencies: managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AUTO_LAUNCH .

fields.label: Device Health Monitoring
fields.description: Controls device health monitoring. Default value: false Dependencies: managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AUTO_LAUNCH .

fields.label: System Log Upload Enabled
fields.description: Controls device system log upload. Default value: false Dependencies: managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AUTO_LAUNCH .

fields.label: User Display Name
fields.description: Session name to display on login screen. Specifies the name of a managed guest session on the login screen. Dependencies: managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_ALLOWED managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AUTO_LAUNCH .

fields.label: Restricted Managed Guest Session Extension Cleanup Exempt List
fields.description: Extension IDs. Enter a list of extension IDs. Each extension ID must be exactly 32 characters.

fields.label: Session Duration Limit Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Task Manager End Process Enabled
fields.description: Controls whether users are allowed to end processes with the Chrome task manager. Default value: true.

fields.label: Extension Extended Background Lifetime For Port Connections To Urls
fields.description: Origins that grant extended background lifetime to connecting extensions. Enter a list of origins. Extensions that connect to one of these origins will be be kept running as long as the port is connected. One URL per line.

fields.label: Insecure Hashes In TLS Handshakes Enabled
Browsing History Ttl Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Download History Ttl Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Cookies And Other Site Data Ttl
Cookies And Other Site Data Ttl Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Cached Images And Files Ttl Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Password Signin Ttl Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Autofill Ttl Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Site Settings Ttl Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Hosted App Data Ttl Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Saving Browser History Disabled
fields.description: Controls whether managed users' browser histories are retained. Default value: false.

fields.label: Suppress Unsupported OS Warning
fields.description: Suppresses the warning that appears when Google Chrome is running on an unsupported computer or operating system. Default value: false.

fields.label: Override Security Restrictions On Insecure Origin
fields.description: Origin or hostname patterns to ignore insecure origins security restrictions. Specifies the origin or hostname patterns for which restrictions on insecure origins should not apply.

fields.label: Target Blank Implies No Opener
fields.description: Controls whether pop-ups opened with a target of _blank can interact with the page that opened the pop-up. Default value: true.

fields.label: Security Token Session Notification Seconds Duration
fields.description: Duration.

fields.label: Brightness Enabled
fields.description: Controls whether initial scren brightness is set. Default value: false.

fields.label: Brightness Ac
fields.description: Screen brightness (ac power). Specifies the screen brightness percent when running on AC power. Min. value: 0 Max. value: 100 Dependencies: brightnessEnabled: true .

fields.label: Brightness Battery
fields.description: Screen brightness (battery power). Specifies the screen brightness percent when running on battery power. Min. value: 0 Max. value: 100 Dependencies: brightnessEnabled: true .

fields.label: Remote Debugging Allowed
fields.description: Controls whether users may use remote debugging by specifying "--remote-debugging-port" and "--remote-debugging-pipe" command line switches. Default value: true.

fields.label: Display Capture Permissions Policy Enabled
fields.description: Selections to allow insecure requests to access the display. Default value: true.

fields.label: Web Sql In Third Party Context Enabled
fields.description: Selections for enabling WebSQL in third party contexts. Default value: false.

fields.label: Web Sql Non Secure Context Enabled
fields.description: Forces WebSQL in non-secure contexts to be enabled. Default value: false.

fields.label: Web Sql Access
fields.description: Force WebSQL to be enabled. Default value: false.

fields.label: New Base URL Inheritance Behavior Allowed
fields.description: Allows enabling the feature NewBaseUrlInheritanceBehavior. Default value: true.

fields.label: Encrypted Client Hello Enabled
fields.description: Enable EncryptedClientHello (ECH), an extension to TLS to encrypt sensitive fields of the ClientHello and improve privacy. Default value: true.

fields.label: Strict Mimetype Check For Worker Scripts Enabled
fields.description: Enables strict MIME checking for worker scripts. Default value: true.

fields.label: Origin Agent Cluster Default Enabled
fields.description: The Origin-Agent-Cluster HTTP header controls whether a document is isolated in an origin-keyed agent cluster, or in a site-keyed agent cluster. Default value: true.

fields.label: File Or Directory Picker Without Gesture Allowed For Origins
fields.description: Allow file or directory picker APIs to be called without prior user gesture. Urls to allow file or directory pickers without user gesture.

fields.label: Screen Capture Without Gesture Allowed For Origins
fields.description: Allow screen capture without prior user gesture. Urls to allow screencapture without user gesture.

fields.label: Allow Back Forward Cache For Cache Control No Store Page Enabled
fields.description: Allows pages with the header Cache-Control: no-store to be cached inthe back/forward cache. Default value: true.

fields.label: Show Logout Button In Tray
fields.description: Adds a logout button to the system tray. Default value: true.

fields.label: Suggest Logout After Closing Last Window
fields.description: Controls whether the logout confirmation dialog is displayed. Default value: true.

fields.label: Homepage Location
fields.description: Homepage URL. Specifies the URL that should be used as the home page in managed Chrome. Dependencies: homepageIsNewTabPage: FALSE .

fields.label: New Tab Page Location
fields.description: New tab URL (leave empty for default). Specifies the URL of the page that should load when Chrome opens a new tab.

fields.label: Lens Desktop Ntp Search Enabled
fields.description: Enable showing Google Lens button in the search box when a new tab is opened. Default value: true.

fields.label: Restore On Startup Urls
fields.description: Startup pages. Example: https://example.com. Dependencies: restoreOnStartup: RESTORE_ON_STARTUP_ENUM_LIST_OF_URLS restoreOnStartup: RESTORE_ON_STARTUP_ENUM_LIST_OF_URLS_AND_RESTORE_SESSION .

enumLabels.LIST_OF_URLS_AND_RESTORE_SESSION: List Of Urls And Restore Session

fields.label: Startup Browser Window Launch Suppressed
fields.description: Controls whether the Chrome browser is automatically launched on login. Default value: false.

fields.label: Force Google Safe Search
fields.description: SafeSearch for Google Search queries. Specifies whether SafeSearch must be used for Google Search queries. Default value: false.

fields.label: Disable Screenshots
fields.description: Controls whether a managed user can take screenshots on a ChromeOS device. Default value: false.

fields.label: Screen Capture Allowed By Origins
fields.description: Allow tab, window, and desktop video capture by these sites. Sites set in this list will be ignored in the 'screenCaptureAllowed' field.

fields.label: Window Capture Allowed By Origins
fields.description: Allow tab and window video capture by these sites. Sites set in this list will be ignored in the 'screenCaptureAllowedByOrigins' and 'screenCaptureAllowed' fields.

fields.label: Tab Capture Allowed By Origins
fields.description: Allow tab video capture by these sites. Sites set in this list will be ignored in the 'windowCaptureAllowedByOrigins', 'screenCaptureAllowedByOrigins', and 'screenCaptureAllowed' fields.

fields.label: Same Origin Tab Capture Allowed By Origins
fields.description: Allow tab video capture (same site only) by these sites. Sites set in this list will be ignored in the 'tabCaptureAllowedByOrigins', 'windowCaptureAllowedByOrigins', 'screenCaptureAllowedByOrigins', and 'screenCaptureAllowed' fields.

fields.label: Screen Capture Allowed
fields.description: Controls whether sites are allowed to prompt the user to share a video stream of their screen. Default value: true.

fields.label: Use Mojo Video Decoder For Pepper Allowed
fields.description: Allow Pepper to use a new decoder for hardware accelerated video decoding. Default value: true.

fields.label: Pp API Shared Images Swap Chain Allowed
fields.description: Allow modern buffer allocation for Graphics3D APIs PPAPI plugin. Default value: true.

fields.label: Java Script Jit Allowed For Sites
fields.description: Allow JavaScript to use JIT on these sites. Specifies the site allowlist for JavaScript to use JIT.

fields.label: Java Script Jit Blocked For Sites
fields.description: Block JavaScript from using JIT on these sites. Specifies the site blocklist for JavaScript to be blocked from using. JIT.

fields.label: Clipboard Allowed For Urls
fields.description: Allow these sites to access the clipboard. Urls to allow clipboard access.

fields.label: Clipboard Blocked For Urls
fields.description: Block these sites from accessing the clipboard. Urls to block clipboard access.

fields.label: Notifications Allowed For Urls
fields.description: Allow these sites to show notifications. Urls to allow notifications. Prefix domain with [*.] to include all subdomains.Maximum of 1000 URLs. .

fields.label: Notifications Blocked For Urls
fields.description: Block notifications on these sites. Urls to block notifications. Prefix domain with [*.] to include all subdomains.Maximum of 1000 URLs. .

fields.label: Autoplay Allowlist
fields.description: Allowed URLs. URL patterns allowed to autoplay. Prefix domain with [*.] to include all subdomains. Use * to allow all domains.

fields.label: Auto Open Allowed For Urls
fields.description: Auto open URLs. If this policy is set, only downloads that match these URLs and have an auto open type will be auto opened. If this policy is left unset, all downloads matching an auto open type will be auto opened. Wildcards ("*") are allowed when appended to a URL, but cannot be entered alone.

fields.label: Auto Open File Types
fields.description: Auto open files types. Do not include the leading separator when listing the type. For example, use "txt", not ".txt".

fields.label: Popups Allowed For Urls
fields.description: Allow pop-ups on these sites. Urls to allow pop-ups.

fields.label: Popups Blocked For Urls
fields.description: Block pop-ups on these sites. Urls to block pop-ups.

fields.label: Suppress Cross Origin Iframe Dialogs
fields.description: Controls whether JavaScript dialogs triggered from a cross-origin iframe are allowed or blocked. Default value: true.

fields.label: Throttle Non Visible Cross Origin Iframes Allowed
fields.description: Throttle non-visible, cross-origin iframes. Default value: true.

fields.label: Sandbox External Protocol Blocked
fields.description: Controls whether navigation to external protocols inside a sandboxed iframe is allowed. Default value: true.

fields.label: URL Blocklist
fields.description: Blocked URLs. Any URL in this list will be blocked, unless it also appears in the list of exceptions specified in 'urlAllowlist'. Maximum of 1000 URLs. Note: to block OS and browser settings set the 'chrome.users.SystemFeaturesDisableList' policy instead of blocking 'chrome://' URLs.

fields.label: URL Allowlist
fields.description: Blocked URL exceptions. Any URL that matches an entry in this exception list will be allowed, even if it matches an entry in the blocked URLs. Wildcards ("*") are allowed when appended to a URL, but cannot be entered alone. Maximum of 1000 URLs. .

fields.label: Show Cast Icon In Toolbar
fields.description: Controls whether the Cast icon is always shown in the toolbar, or not shown in the toolbar by default subject to user choice. Default value: false Dependencies: enableMediaRouter: true .

fields.label: Enable Media Router
fields.description: Allow users to Cast from Chrome. Controls whether managed users can use Google Cast in Chrome. Default value: true.

fields.label: Show Cast Sessions Started By Other Devices
Insecure Content Allowed For Urls
fields.description: URL patterns to allow. Specifies which sites should allow insecure (HTTP) content to be shown.

fields.label: Insecure Content Blocked For Urls
fields.description: URL patterns to block. Specifies which sites should block insecure (HTTP) content from being shown.

fields.label: Insecure Private Network Requests Allowed
fields.description: Controls whether websites are allowed to make requests to more-private network endpoints in an insecure manner. Default value: false.

fields.label: Insecure Private Network Requests Allowed For Urls
fields.description: URL patterns to allow. Network requests to more-private endpoints, from insecure origins not covered by the patterns specified here, will use the global default value.

fields.label: Insecure Forms Warnings Enabled
fields.description: Controls whether warnings are shown and autofill is disabled for insecure forms. Default value: true.

fields.label: Prefixed Storage Info Enabled
fields.description: Controls whether the non-standard API window.webkitStorageInfo is re-enabled, as it is deprecated and planned for removal. Default value: false.

fields.label: Load Crypto Token Extension
fields.description: Options to enable the CryptoToken component until Chrome 107. Default value: false.

fields.label: Network File Shares Allowed
fields.description: Wllows or blocks network file shares for managed users. Default value: true.

fields.label: Net Bios Share Discovery Enabled
fields.description: Use the NetBIOS name query request protocol to discover shares on the network. Specifies whether the user can use. NetBIOS name query request protocol to discover shares on the network. Default value: false Dependencies: networkFileSharesAllowed: true .

fields.label: Ntlm Share Authentication Enabled
fields.description: Use NTLM as an authentication protocol for SMB mounts. Controls whether the network file shares will use NTLM as an authentication protocol for SMB mounts. Default value: false Dependencies: networkFileSharesAllowed: true .

fields.label: Network File Shares Preconfigured Shares Preconfigured Files
fields.description: A list of configurations for Network file shares.

fields.label: Scroll To Text Fragment Enabled
fields.description: Controls whether a managed user can follow links which scroll to a text fragment on a page. Default value: true.

fields.label: Optimization Guide Fetching Enabled
fields.description: Enables or disables fetching of page load metadata and machine learning models that enhance the browsing experience. Default value: true.

fields.label: App Cache Force Enabled
fields.description: Enable AppCache - a deprecated web feature allowing websites to save data offline. Default value: false.

fields.label: PDF Local File Access Allowed For Domains
fields.description: Allowed URLs. List of file URLs with local access enabled in the PDF viewer.

fields.label: Trash Enabled
fields.description: Enable the capability to send files to the trash (on supported filesystems) in the Google ChromeOS Files app. Default value: true.

fields.label: Native Client Force Allowed
fields.description: Controls whether or not the Native Client can be force enabled even if the default behavior would otherwise disable it. Default value: false.

fields.label: Shopping List Enabled
fields.description: Enables or disables the shopping list feature, which will present users with UI to track the price of the product displayed on the current page. Default value: true.

fields.label: Force Enable Pepper Video Decoder Dev API
fields.description: Force enable support for the PPB_VideoDecoder(Dev) API. Default value: false.

fields.label: Default Third Party Storage Partitioning Setting
Third Party Storage Partitioning Blocked For Origins
fields.description: Block third-party storage partitioning for these origins. Specifies top-level origins which block third-party storage partitioning. Dependencies: defaultThirdPartyStoragePartitioningSetting: DEFAULT_THIRD_PARTY_STORAGE_PARTITIONING_SETTING_ENUM_ALLOW_PARTITIONING .

fields.label: Managed Bookmarks Bookmarks
fields.description: Top level configuration of the bookmark folder.

fields.label: Managed Bookmarks Toplevel Name
fields.description: The name of the folder in which Managed Bookmarks live. Defaults to "Managed Bookmarks".

fields.label: Download Bubble Enabled
fields.description: Enables the download bubble UI in Google Chrome. Default value: true.

enumLabels.ALLOW_DEVELOPER_TOOLS_EXCEPT_FORCE_INSTA: Allow Developer Tools Except Force Installed

fields.label: Autofill Address Enabled
fields.description: Controls whether AutoFill for addresses is enabled. Default value: true.

fields.label: Autofill Credit Card Enabled
fields.description: Controls whether AutoFill for credit cards is enabled. Default value: true.

fields.label: Payment Method Query Enabled
fields.description: Allows websites to query for available payment methods. Default value: true.

fields.label: Physical Keyboard Predictive Writing
fields.description: Enables or disables the predictive writing feature for physical keyboards. Default value: true.

fields.label: Physical Keyboard Autocorrect
fields.description: Enables or disables the autocorrect feature on the physical keyboard. Default value: true.

fields.label: Emoji Suggestion Enabled
fields.description: Enables Emoji Suggestion. Default value: false.

fields.label: Unified Desktop Enabled By Default
fields.description: Configures Unified Desktop on ChromeOS devices, a feature that allows open ChromeOS apps to span multiple monitors. Default value: false.

fields.label: Quick Answers Enabled
fields.description: Enables or disables Quick Answers. Default value: true.

fields.label: Quick Answers Definition Enabled
fields.description: Gives Quick Answers permission to access selected content and send the info to the server to get definition results. Default value: true Dependencies: quickAnswersEnabled: true .

fields.label: Quick Answers Translation Enabled
fields.description: Gives Quick Answers permission to access selected content and send the info to the server to get definition results. Default value: true Dependencies: quickAnswersEnabled: true .

fields.label: Quick Answers Unit Conversion Enabled
fields.description: Gives Quick Answers permission to access selected content and send the info to the server to get unit conversion results. Default value: true Dependencies: quickAnswersEnabled: true .

fields.label: User Borealis Allowed
fields.description: Allows users to user Borealis on Google ChromeOS. Default value: false.

fields.label: App Recommendation Zero State Enabled
fields.description: Enable recommendations in the launcher for apps that have been previously installed by the user on other devices. Default value: false.

fields.label: Suggested Content Enabled
fields.description: Enables or disables suggested content. Default value: false.

fields.label: Show Full Urls In Address Bar
Fullscreen Allowed
fields.description: Allows fullscreen mode. Default value: true.

fields.label: Keep Fullscreen Without Notification URL Allow List
fields.description: Keep full screen after unlock without warning for the following URLs. Enter a list of URL patterns, one per line.

fields.label: Force Maximize On First Run
fields.description: Controls whether Chrome maximizes the first window shown on first run. Default value: false.

fields.label: User Feedback Allowed
fields.description: Allows user feedback. Default value: true.

fields.label: Device Allow Mgs To Store Display Properties
fields.description: Allows Managed Guest Session to persist display properties. Default value: false.

fields.label: Lens Region Search Enabled
fields.description: Allows Google Lens region search menu item to be shown in context menu if supported. Default value: true.

fields.label: Lock Icon In Address Bar Enabled
fields.description: Sets the icon used for secure connections. Default value: false.

fields.label: URL Param Filter Enabled
fields.description: Allows filtering of URL parameters in the browser. Default value: true.

fields.label: Google Search Side Panel Enabled
fields.description: If set to enabled Side Panel search is allowed on all web pages. If set to disabled, Side Panel search is not available on any webpage. Default value: true.

fields.label: Web USB Ask For Urls
fields.description: Allow these sites to ask for USB access. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see URL patterns at https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard is not valid.

fields.label: Web USB Blocked For Urls
fields.description: Block these sites from asking for USB access. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see URL patterns at https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard is not valid.

fields.label: Web USB Allow Devices For Urls
Web USB Allow Devices For Urls Web Applications
fields.description: A list of web applications, each with its allowed USB devices.

fields.label: Audio Capture Allowed
fields.description: Microphone and audio input. Controls whether audio input (not just from the built-in microphone) is disabled or if users are prompted to allow it each time. Default value: true.

fields.label: Audio Capture Allowed Urls
fields.description: URL patterns to allow. URLs that will be granted access to the audio input device without a prompt. Prefix domain with [*.] to include subdomains.

fields.label: Audio Output Allowed
fields.description: Speakers and audio output. Enables or disables audio output. Default value: true.

fields.label: Video Capture Allowed
fields.description: Enables or disables camera input for websites and apps. Default value: true.

fields.label: Video Capture Allowed Urls
fields.description: URL patterns to allow. URLs that will be granted access to the video input device without a prompt. Prefix domain with [*.] to include subdomains.

fields.label: Keyboard Default To Function Keys
fields.description: Top-row key behavior. Configures whether the top keyboard row is treated as function (F1-F12) or media keys. Default value: false.

fields.label: Serial Ask For Urls
fields.description: Allow the Web Serial API on these sites. List of URLs that specify websites that will be allowed to ask users to grant them access to the serial ports. Prefix domain with [*.] to include subdomains.

fields.label: Serial Blocked For Urls
fields.description: Block the Web Serial API on these sites. List of URLs patterns that specify which websites can't ask users to grant them access to a serial port. Prefix domain with [*.] to include subdomains.

fields.label: Serial Allow USB Devices For Urls
Serial Allow USB Devices For Urls Web Origin
fields.description: A list of web origins, each with its allowed USB devices.

fields.label: Default File System Read Guard Setting
File System Read Ask For Urls
fields.description: Allow file system read access on these sites. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see URL patterns at https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard is not valid.

fields.label: File System Read Blocked For Urls
fields.description: Block read access on these sites. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see URL patterns at https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard is not valid.

fields.label: File System Sync Access Handle Async Interface Enabled
fields.description: Re-enables the deprecated asynchronous interface for FileSystemSyncAccessHandle in File System Access API. Default value: false.

fields.label: Sensors Allowed For Urls
fields.description: Allow access to sensors on these sites. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard is not valid.

fields.label: Sensors Blocked For Urls
fields.description: Block access to sensors on these sites. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns Note: using only the "*" wildcard is not valid.

fields.label: Enterprise Hardware Platform API Enabled
fields.description: Enables managed extensions to use the Enterprise Hardware Platform API. Default value: false.

fields.label: USB Detector Notification Enabled
fields.description: Enable USB device detected notifications. Default value: true.

fields.label: Safe Browsing Proxied Real Time Checks Allowed
fields.description: Allow Safe Browsing's standard protection mode to send partial hashes of URLs to Google. This controls whether. Safe Browsing's standard protection mode is allowed to send partial hashes of URLs to Google. Default value: true Dependencies: safeBrowsingProtectionLevel: SAFE_BROWSING_PROTECTION_LEVEL_ENUM_USER_CHOICE safeBrowsingProtectionLevel: SAFE_BROWSING_PROTECTION_LEVEL_ENUM_STANDARD_PROTECTION .

fields.label: Disable Safe Browsing Proceed Anyway
fields.description: Option to disable bypassing of safe browsing warnings. Default value: false.

fields.label: Lookalike Warning Allowlist Domains
fields.description: Allowlisted Domains. Enter list of domains where Chrome should prevent the display of lookalike URL warnings.

fields.label: Ads Setting For Intrusive Ads Sites
Abusive Experience Intervention Enforce
fields.description: Controls whether sites with abusive experiences are prevented from opening new windows or tabs. Default value: true.

fields.label: Allow Wake Locks
fields.description: Enables or disables wake locks for power management. Default value: true.

fields.label: Allow Screen Wake Locks
fields.description: Screen wake locks. Enables or disables screen wake locks for power management. Default value: true Dependencies: allowWakeLocks: true .

fields.label: Lock On Sleep Or Lid Close
Allow For Chrome Devices
fields.description: Chromebooks (by device). Allow managed devices to use the wifi network. Default value: false.

fields.label: Allow For Chrome Users
fields.description: Chromebooks (by user). Allow managed users to use the wifi network. Default value: false.

fields.label: Details SSID
fields.description: SSID. Sets the WiFi network's SSID. This field is case sensitive.

fields.label: Details Hidden SSID
fields.description: Hidden network. Sets whether this wifi network broadcasts its SSID.

fields.label: Details Automatically Connect
fields.description: Configures if devices will automatically connect to this network.

fields.label: Details Security
fields.description: Security type. Sets the security type of the WiFi network. Required fields: For values: WEP-PSK, WPA-PSK; Required: passphrase. For values: WPA-EAP, WEP-8021X; Required: eap.outerProtocol .

fields.label: Details Passphrase
fields.description: Passphase. Sets the password of the network. Only affects WEP and WPA/WPA2 security types. Omit to retain current password, set to "" to clear the value. Dependencies: security: WEP-PSK security: WPA-PSK .

fields.label: Details EAP Outer Protocol
fields.description: Outer protocol. Sets the outer extensible authentication protocol. Required fields: For values: PEAP; Required: innerProtocol, useSystemCas. For values: EAP-TLS; Required: tlsVersionMax, useSystemCas For values: EAP-TTLS; Required: innerProtocol, useSystemCas .

fields.label: Details EAP Inner Protocol
fields.description: Inner protocol. Sets the inner extensible authentication protocol. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS .

fields.label: Details EAP Use System Cas
fields.description: Allows using Server Certificate Authorities. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TLS outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS .

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Ref
fields.description: SCEP Profile. Sets the SCEP Profile. Dependencies: outerProtocol: EAP-TLS outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS .

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Enrollment Urls
fields.description: Client enrollment URLs. Set the client enrollment URLs of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer
Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer Common Name
fields.description: Common name. Sets the common name of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer Locality
fields.description: Locality. Sets the locality of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer Organization
fields.description: Organization. Sets the organization of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Issuer Organizational Unit
fields.description: Organizational unit. Sets the organizational unit of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject
Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject Common Name
fields.description: Common name. Sets the common name of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject Locality
fields.description: Locality. Sets the locality of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject Organization
fields.description: Organization. Sets the organization of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Client Certificate Pattern Subject Organizational Unit
fields.description: Organizational unit. Sets the organizational unit of the certificate pattern.

fields.label: Details EAP Identity
fields.description: Username. Sets the username of the EAP. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: LEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TLS outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS outerProtocol: EAP-PWD .

fields.label: Details EAP Password
fields.description: Password. Sets the password of the EAP. Omit from requests to retain current value, set to "" to clear the value. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: LEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS outerProtocol: EAP-PWD .

fields.label: Details EAP Anonymous Identity
fields.description: Outer identity. Sets the outer identity of the EAP. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS .

fields.label: Details EAP TLS Version Max
fields.description: Maximum TLS version. Sets the maximum TLS version of the EAP. Dependencies: outerProtocol: EAP-TLS .

fields.label: Details EAP Server CA Ref
fields.description: Server Certificate Authority. Sets the Server Certificate Authority. Dependencies: useSystemCas: false .

fields.label: Details EAP Domain Suffix Match
fields.description: Server certificate domain suffix match. Sets constraints on the suffix of the domain name in server certificate. Dependencies: outerProtocol: PEAP outerProtocol: EAP-TLS outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS .

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Type
fields.description: Proxy Type. Sets the proxy type of the network. Required fields: For values: Manual; Required: manualConfiguration. For values: PAC; Required: automaticProxyConfigurationUrl .

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration HTTP Proxy
Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration HTTP Proxy Host
fields.description: Host. Sets the host of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration HTTP Proxy Port
fields.description: Port. Sets the port of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Secure HTTP Proxy
Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Secure HTTP Proxy Host
fields.description: Host. Sets the host of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Secure HTTP Proxy Port
fields.description: Port. Sets the port of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Ftp Proxy
Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Ftp Proxy Host
fields.description: Host. Sets the host of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Ftp Proxy Port
fields.description: Port. Sets the port of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Socks
Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Socks Host
fields.description: Host. Sets the host of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Manual Configuration Socks Port
fields.description: Port. Sets the port of the proxy setting.

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Exclude Domains
fields.description: Domains with no proxy. Sets the domains with no proxy in manual proxy configuration. Dependencies: type: Manual .

fields.label: Details Proxy Settings Automatic Proxy Configuration URL
fields.description: Autoconfiguration URL. Sets the autoconfiguration URL in automatic proxy configuration. Dependencies: type: PAC .

fields.label: Details Allow IP Configuration
fields.description: IP settings. Allow IP address to be configured on the device (ChromeOS only).

fields.label: Details Allow Name Servers Configuration
fields.description: Allow name servers to be configured on the device.

fields.label: Details Custom Name Servers
fields.description: Custom name servers. Sets domain values in custom name servers. Dependencies: nameServerSelection: NAME_SERVERS_ENUM_CUSTOM .

fields.label: Details Name
fields.description: Name. Wifi network name.

fields.label: Whitelist All Required Apps
fields.description: Automatically whitelist all required apps of the app compliance (regardless of shared device or not).

fields.label: Whitelist All Auto Deployed Apps
fields.description: Automatically whitelist all auto-deployed apps of the user (regardless of shared device or not).

fields.label: Remove All Auto Deployed Required Apps
fields.description: Automatically remove all auto-deployed apps isAutoDeploy() if not required app anymore.

fields.label: Whitelist Local Secret Prompts
fields.description: Allows local secret prompts, including Google logins (via SLGoogleAuth) and iCloud login.

fields.label: Whitelisted Apps
fields.description: Black or whitelist according to isBlacklist value.

fields.label: Identifier
fields.description: Represents several kinds of app identification.n {n "displayName": "Facebook",n "packageName": "com.facebook.client",n "appUuid": "69B41687-22D7-4CDA-A3DF-E52ACA8C6721",n "externalId": "376353264",n "iconUrl": "http://is5.mzstatic.com/...4-87a699ba14ec/Icon.png"n }.

fields.label: Identifier Display Name
fields.description: Human readable name (e.g. Facebook).

fields.label: Identifier Package Name
fields.description: Bundle identifier / package name (e.g. com.facebook.client).

fields.label: Identifier App UUID
fields.description: Relution app UUID (e.g. 69B41687-22D7-4CDA-A3DF-E52ACA8C6721).

fields.label: Identifier External ID
fields.description: External app ID (e.g. iTunesId=756904853).

fields.label: Identifier Icon URL

fields.label: Identifier Product ID
fields.description: Windows Product ID (e.g.: 9nblggh5l9xt for Instagram).

fields.label: Identifier Country
fields.description: required for Windows, see {@link WindowsAppstoreService#getRequiredStoreAppProperties(String, String) WindowsAppstoreService#getRequiredStoreAppProperties(String, String)}.

fields.label: Enable Calendars User Overridable
fields.description: If false, prevents the user from changing the state of the Calendars service for this account in Settings.n Default: true.

fields.label: Enable Mail
fields.description: If false, disables the Mail service for this account. The Mail service may be re-enabled in Settings unless. EnableMailUserOverridable is false.n EnableMail, EnableContacts, EnableCalendars, EnableReminders, and EnableNotes can't all be set to false.n Default: true.

fields.label: Enable Mail User Overridable
fields.description: If false, prevents the user from changing the state of the Mail service for this account in Settings.n Default: true.

fields.label: Enable Notes

fields.label: Enable Notes User Overridable

fields.description: If false, prevents the user from changing the state of the Reminders service for this account in Settings.n Default: true.

fields.label: Enable Contacts
fields.description: If false, disables the Contacts service for this account. The Contacts service may be re-enabled in Settings unless EnableContactsUserOverridable is false.n EnableMail, EnableContacts, EnableCalendars, EnableReminders, and EnableNotes can't all be set to false.n Default: true.

fields.label: Enable Contacts User Overridable
fields.description: If false, prevents the user from changing the state of the Contacts service for this account in Settings.n Default: true.

fields.label: Smime Signing Enabled
fields.description: If set to `true`, S/MIME signing is enabled for this account.

fields.label: Smime Signing User Overrideable
fields.description: If set to `true`, the user can toggle S/MIME signing on or off in Settings.

fields.label: Smime Enable Per Message Switch
fields.description: If `true`, displays the per-message encryption switch in the Mail Compose UI.
