lockScreenImageNull.description: Not supported by all configurations. Will return null if not supported.

lockScreenImage.description: Not supported by all configurations. Will return null if not supported.

lockScreenText.description: Not supported by all configurations. Will return null if not supported.

lockScreenTextColor.description: Not supported by all configurations. Will return null if not supported.

overrideApns.description: Whether override APNs are disabled or enabled. @see DevicePolicyManager.setOverrideApnsEnabled for more details.

apnSettings.description:
APN settings for override APNs.

There must not be any conflict between any of the APN settings provided, otherwise the policy will be rejected. Two ApnSettings are considered to conflict when all following fields match on both:

  • `numericOperatorId`
  • `apn`
  • `proxyAddress`
  • `proxyPort`
  • `mmsProxyAddress`
  • `mmsProxyPort`
  • `mmsc`
  • `mvnoType`
  • `protocol`
  • `roamingProtocol`

If some of the APN settings result in non-compliance of. INVALID_VALUE, they will be ignored.

This can be set on fully managed devices on Android 10 and above. This can also be set on work profiles on Android 13 and above and only with ApnSetting's with ENTERPRISE APN type.

A `NonComplianceDetail` with API_LEVEL is reported if the Android version is less than 10.

A `NonComplianceDetail` with MANAGEMENT_MODE is reported for work profiles on Android versions less than 13.

ApnPolicy.description:
Access Point Name (APN) policy. Configuration for Access Point Names (APNs) which may override any other APNs on the
device. See OVERRIDE_APNS_ENABLED and overrideApns for details.

apnTypes.description:
Usage categories for the APN. Policy will be rejected if this field is empty or contains
`APN_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED` or duplicates. Multiple APN types can be set on fully managed devices.
`ENTERPRISE` is the only allowed APN type on work profiles. A `NonComplianceDetail` with
`MANAGEMENT_MODE` is reported for any other value on work profiles. APN types that are not
supported on the device or management mode will be ignored. If this results in the empty list,
the APN setting will be ignored, because `apnTypes` is a required field. A `NonComplianceDetail`
with `INVALID_VALUE` is reported if none of the APN types are supported on the device or
management mode.

apn.description: Name of the APN. Policy will be rejected if this field is empty.

displayName.description: Human-readable name that describes the APN. Policy will be rejected if this field is empty.

alwaysOnSetting.description:
Whether User Plane resources have to be activated during every transition from CM-IDLE mode to. 
CM-CONNECTED state for this APN. See 3GPP TS 23.501 section 5.6.13.

carrierId.description: Carrier ID for the APN. A value of 0 (default) means not set and negative values are rejected.

mmsProxyAddress.description:
MMS (Multimedia Messaging Service) proxy address of the APN which can be an IP address or
hostname (not a URL).

mmsProxyPort.description:
MMS (Multimedia Messaging Service) proxy port of the APN. A value of 0 (default) means not set
and negative values are rejected.

mmsc.description: MMSC (Multimedia Messaging Service Center) URI of the APN.

mtuV4.description:
The default MTU (Maximum Transmission Unit) size in bytes of the IPv4 routes brought up by this. 
APN setting. A value of 0 (default) means not set and negative values are rejected. Supported
on Android 13 and above. A `NonComplianceDetail` with `API_LEVEL` is reported if the Android
version is less than 13.

mtuV6.description:
The MTU (Maximum Transmission Unit) size of the IPv6 mobile interface to which the APN connected.
A value of 0 (default) means not set and negative values are rejected. Supported on Android 13
and above. A `NonComplianceDetail` with `API_LEVEL` is reported if the Android version is less
than 13.

mvnoType.description: MVNO match type for the APN.

networkTypes.description:
Radio technologies (network types) the APN may use. Policy will be rejected if this field
contains `NETWORK_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED` or duplicates.

numericOperatorId.description:
The numeric operator ID of the APN. Numeric operator ID is defined as MCC (Mobile Country Code)
+ MNC (Mobile Network Code).

protocol.description: The protocol to use to connect to this APN.

roamingProtocol.description: The protocol to use to connect to this APN while the device is roaming.

proxyAddress.description: The proxy address of the APN.

proxyPort.description: The proxy port of the APN. A value of 0 (default) means not set and negative values are rejected.

ApnSetting.description:
An Access Point Name (APN) configuration for a carrier data connection. The APN provides configuration to connect a
cellular network device to an IP data network. A carrier uses this setting to decide which IP address to assign, any
security methods to apply, and how the device might be connected to private networks.

AppRestrictionsItem.description:
A dictionary defining an app for parental control.
macOS 10.7+

designatedRequirement.description:
(Required) The code signature designated requirement of the app using the per-app VPN.

Only used for macOS.

identifier.description: The bundle identifier of the app. Must be unique, i.e. for a given identifier there can only be one mapping.

path.description:
The file-system path of the executable using the per-app VPN.

Only used for macOS.

signingIdentifier.description:
(Required) The code signature signing identifier of the app using the per-app VPN.

Only used for macOS.

vpnUuid.description:
The uuid of the vpn configuration. Should be a uuid of a VPN configuration. 
Configuration that is part of the same policy version
as this mapping configuration.

appName.description: The app name for presentational purposes.

iconUrl.description: App icon url for presentational purposes.

vpnEnabled.description:
whether the vpn configuration is enabled and has
perAppVpnEnabled enabled.
Managed by the backend.

dnsSettings.description: Settings for an encrypted DNS server.

prohibitDisablement.description:
If `true`, prohibits users from disabling DNS settings.
This key is only available on supervised devices.
Default: false.

dnsProtocol.description: The encrypted transport protocol used to communicate with the DNS server.

serverAddresses.description:
An unordered list of DNS server IP address strings.
These IP addresses can be a mixture of IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.

serverName.description:
The hostname of a DNS-over-TLS server used to validate the server certificate, as defined in RFC 7858.
If no serverAddresses are provided, the hostname will be used to determine the server
addresses.
This key must be present only if the DNSProtocol is TLS.

serverUrl.description:
The URI template of a DNS-over-HTTPS server, as defined in RFC 8484.
This URL must use the https:// scheme, and the hostname or address in the URL will be used to validate the
server
certificate.
If no serverAddresses are provided, the hostname or address in the URL will be used to
determine
the server addresses.
This key must be present only if the DNSProtocol is HTTPS.

supplementalMatchDomains.description:
A list of domain strings used to determine which DNS queries will use the DNS server.
If this array is not provided, all domains will use the DNS server.
A single wildcard * prefix is supported, but is not required.
For example, both *.example.com and example.com match against mydomain.example.com and
your.domain.example.com, but
do not match against mydomain-example.com.

deniedBundleIdentifiers.description:
An array of bundle identifiers of apps that don’t use SSO provided by this extension. Available in iOS 15 and later,
and macOS 12 and later.

extensionData.description: A dictionary of arbitrary data passed through to the app extension.

extensionIdentifier.description: The bundle identifier of the app extension that performs SSO for the specified URLs (Required) .

hosts.description:
An array of host or domain names that apps can authenticate through the app extension. Required for Credential payloads. Ignored for Redirect payloads. The system:
  • Matches host or domain names case-insensitively
  • Requires that all the host and domain names of all installed Extensible SSO payloads are unique
Note: Host names that begin with a “.” are wildcard suffixes that match all subdomains; otherwise the host name needs be an exact match.

platformSso.description: The dictionary to configure Platform SSO.

realm.description: The realm name for Credential payloads. Use proper capitalization for this value. Ignored for Redirect payloads.

registrationToken.description:
The token this device uses for registration with Platform SSO. Use it for silent registration with the Identity. 
Provider. Requires that AuthenticationMethod isn’t empty. Available in macOS 13 and later.

screenLockedBehavior.description:
If set to Cancel, the system cancels authentication requests when the screen is locked. If set to DoNotHandle, the
request continues without SSO instead. This does not apply to requests where userInterfaceEnabled is false, or for
background URLSession requests. Available in iOS 15 and later, and macOS 12 and later.

teamIdentifier.description: The team identifier of the app extension. This key is required on macOS and ignored elsewhere.

urls.description:
An array of URL prefixes of identity providers where the app extension performs SSO. Required for Redirect payloads. Ignored for Credential payloads. The URLs need to begin with http:// or https://. The system:
  • Matches scheme and host name case-insensitively
  • Does not allow query parameters and URL fragments
  • Requires that the URLs of all installed Extensible SSO payloads are unique
.

accountDisplayName.description: The display name for the account in notifications and authentication requests.

additionalGroups.description: The list of created groups that don’t have administrator access.

administratorGroups.description: The list of groups to use for administrator access. The system requests membership during authentication.

authenticationMethod.description:
The Platform SSO authentication method to use with the extension. Requires that the SSO Extension also support the
method.

authorizationGroups.description:
The pairing of Authorization Rights to group names. The system updates the Authorization Right to use the group when
used.

enableAuthorization.description:
Enables using identity provider accounts at authorization prompts. Requires that UseSharedDeviceKeys is true. The
system assigns groups using AdministratorGroups, AdditionalGroups, or AuthorizationGroups.

enableCreateUserAtLogin.description:
Enables creating new users at the login window with an AuthenticationMethod of either Password or SmartCard. Requires
that UseSharedDeviceKeys is true.

loginFrequency.description:
The duration, in seconds, until the system requires a full login instead of a refresh. The default value is 64,800
(18 hours). The minimum value is 3600 (1 hour).

newUserAuthorizationMode.description: The permission to apply to newly created accounts at login.

tokenToUserMapping.description: The attribute mapping to use when creating new users or for authorization.

userAuthorizationMode.description: The permission to apply to an account each time the user authenticates.

useSharedDeviceKeys.description: If true, the system uses the same signing and encryption keys for all users.

fileVaultPolicy.description:
The policy to apply when using Platform SSO at FileVault unlock on Apple Silicon Macs. Applies when. 
AuthenticationMethod is Password. Available in macOS 15 and later.

loginPolicy.description:
The policy to apply when using Platform SSO at the login window. Applies when AuthenticationMethod is Password.
Available in macOS 15 and later.

unlockPolicy.description:
The policy to apply when using Platform SSO at screensaver unlock. Applies when AuthenticationMethod is Password.
Available in macOS 15 and later.

offlineGracePeriod.description:
The amount of time after the last successful Platform SSO login a local account password can be used offline.
Required when 'AllowOfflineGracePeriod' is set.

authenticationGracePeriod.description:
The amount of time after a 'FileVaultPolicy', 'LoginPolicy', or 'UnlockPolicy' is received or updated that
unregistered local accounts can be used. Required when 'AllowAuthenticationGracePeriod' is set.

nonPlatformSsoAccounts.description:
The list of local accounts that are not subject to the 'FileVaultPolicy', 'LoginPolicy', or 'UnlockPolicy'. The
accounts are also not prompted to register for Platform SSO.

accountName.description: The claim name to use for the user’s account name.

fullName.description: The claim name to use for the user’s full name.

AppleMathSettingsConfigurationBasicMode.description: If present, configures the basic mode of the calculator. Basic mode is always enabled.

AppleMathSettingsConfigurationInputModes.description: If present, controls global input options of the calculator. If not present, all input modes are enabled.

AppleMathSettingsConfigurationMathNotesM.description: If present, configures the Math Notes mode of the calculator. If not present, Math Notes mode is enabled.

AppleMathSettingsConfigurationProgrammer.description: If present, configures the programmer mode of the calculator. If not present, programmer mode is enabled.

AppleMathSettingsConfigurationScientific.description: If present, configures the scientific mode of the calculator. If not present, scientific mode is enabled.

AppleMathSettingsConfigurationSystemBeha.description: If present, configures math behavior in the system.

rawContent.description:
The xml payload content of the configuration. Will be parsed and validated each time the configuration is
updated.

firstLevelPayloadType.description:
The first level payload type of the determined by parsing the .mobileconfig.
Is COMMAND if the first level payload type is "Command" or else. 
CONFIGURATION.
Determines the value returned by getPayloadType(). Must be held as a separate property as
getPayloadType() is JsonIgnored and hence would not be persisted.

secondLevelPayloadType.description:
The payload type of the content, will be identified by parsing the content.

Will be used as return type of getType(). Needs to be stored as separate property. Simply adding a "setType" will not persist the value in the resulting json, as the "type" property is already used to determine the. JsonSubType.

notificationSettings.description: An array of notification settings dictionaries (required).

alertType.description:
The type of alert for notifications for the specified app.
Available in iOS 9.3 and later and macOS 10.15 and later.

badgesEnabled.description:
If true, enables badges for this app.
Available in iOS 9.3 and later and macOS 10.15 and later.

bundleIdentifier.description:
The bundle identifier of the app to which to apply these notification settings.
Available in iOS 9.3 and later and macOS 10.15 and later.

criticalAlertEnabled.description:
If true, enables critical alerts that can ignore Do Not Disturb and ringer settings for this app.
Available in iOS 12 and later and macOS 10.15 and later.

groupingType.description: The type of grouping for notifications for this app. Available in iOS 12 and later.

notificationsEnabled.description:
If true, enables notifications for this app.
Available in iOS 9.3 and later and macOS 10.15 and later.

previewType.description:
The type previews for notifications. This key overrides the value at Settings>Notifications>Show Previews.
Available in iOS 14 and later.

showInCarPlay.description:
If true, enables notifications in CarPlay for this app.
Available in iOS 12 and later.

showInLockScreen.description:
If true, enables notifications on the lock screen for this app.
Available in iOS 9.3 and later and macOS 10.15 and later.

showInNotificationCenter.description:
If true, enables notifications in the notification center for this app.
Available in iOS 9.3 and later and macOS 10.15 and later.

soundsEnabled.description: If true, enables sounds for this app.

AppleSafariSettingsConfigurationNewTabSt.description: Sets the start page for new tabs in Safari.

AppleSoftwareUpdateSettingsConfiguration.description: This object configures various automatic Software Update functionality.

Note: only allow configuring "allowed" or "always off" for now. The other beta options require integration
to retrieve seeding service tokens from ASM/ASB, which is not supported at this moment.
The object that configures update deferrals.
These configurations set user access to interacting with Background Security Improvement.

timeZone.description:
The Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA) time zone database name.
If forceAutomaticDateAndTime or
forceAutomaticDateAndTime is set, this setting fails with an error.
Otherwise, setting this value disables automatic time zone logic.
The user can still change the time zone by, for example, switching automatic date and time back on.
The intention is to allow setting the time zone when automatic determination is not available, e.g. when location
services are disabled.

AppleUpdateConfiguration.description: Contains configuration pertaining to the Apple software updates.

blockAfterDays.description:
Number of days the policy is non-compliant before the device or work profile is blocked. To block access immediately,
set to 0. blockAfterDays must be less than wipeAfterDays.

blockScope.description: Specifies the scope of the block. Only applicable to devices that are company-owned.

BlockSettings.description:
An action to block access to apps and data on a fully managed device or in a work profile. This action also triggers
a device or work profile to displays a user-facing notification with information (where possible) on how to correct
the compliance issue. Note: wipeAction must also be specified.

attachAPN.description:
This value is optional in the configuration payload, therefore it doesn't
have to be present in the DB JSON string.

apns.description: This array is optional in the configuration payload, therefore it doesn't have to be present in the DB JSON string.n NOTE: If both, attachAPN and apns, are used then apns takes precedence and it is used by the device.

loginScreenDomainAutoComplete.description:
Determines whether the domain name is autocompleted on the sign-in screen of a managed ChromeOS device.

Default value: false.

loginScreenDomainAutoCompletePrefix.description:
Autocomplete domain prefix. Specifies the domain name to autocomplete on a managed ChromeOS device.

Dependencies: 

loginScreenDomainAutoComplete: true
.

deviceLoginScreenAutoSelectCertificateFo.description:
Automatically select client certificate for these single sign-on sites. Please refer to the support url for the
format of this setting.

deviceLoginScreenPrivacyScreenEnabled.description:
This setting is only supported on devices with an electronic privacy screen.

Default value: UNSET.

deviceLoginScreenPromptOnMultipleMatchin.description:
Controls whether the user is prompted to select a client certificate on the sign-in screen whenever the auto-selection policy matches multiple certificates.

Default value: false.

deviceLoginScreenSystemInfoEnforced.description:
Determines when and how users can display system information on the sign-in screen.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenAccessibilityShortcutsEnabled.description:
Controls whether the accessibility shortcuts accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenAutoclickEnabled.description:
Controls whether the auto-click accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenCaretHighlightEnabled.description:
Controls whether the caret highlight accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenCursorHighlightEnabled.description:
Controls whether the cursor highlight accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenDictationEnabled.description:
Controls whether the dictation accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenHighContrastEnabled.description:
Controls whether the high contrast accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenKeyboardFocusHighlightEnabled.description:
Controls whether the keyboard focus highlight accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenLargeCursorEnabled.description:
Controls whether the large cursor accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenMonoAudioEnabled.description:
Controls whether the mono audio accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

showUserNames.description:
Sign-in screen name and photo visibility. Controls whether the sign-in screen shows names and photos of previously signed in users on managed ChromeOS devices.

Default value: true.

loginScreenPrimaryMouseButtonSwitch.description:
Controls whether the primary mouse button accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenScreenMagnifierType.description:
Controls whether the screen magnifier accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, user-controlled, or when docked.

Default value: DEVICE_LOGIN_SCREEN_SCREEN_MAGNIFIER_TYPE_ENUM_UNSET.

loginScreenSelectToSpeakEnabled.description:
Controls whether the select to speak accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenSpokenFeedbackEnabled.description:
Controls whether the spoken feedback accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenStickyKeysEnabled.description:
Login Screen Sticky Keys Enabled. Controls whether the stickey keys accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

loginScreenVirtualKeyboardEnabled.description:
Controls whether the virtual keyboard accessibility feature on the sign-in screen is enabled, disabled, or user-controlled.

Default value: UNSET.

allowForChromeDevices.description:
Chromebooks (by device). Allow managed devices to use the ethernet network.

Default value: false.

allowForChromeUsers.description:
Chromebooks (by user). Allow managed users to use the ethernet network.

Default value: false.

details.description:
Ethernet network configuration.

Default value: {authentication=None, proxySettings={type=Direct}, allowIpConfiguration=false, allowNameServersConfiguration=false, nameServerSelection=NAME_SERVERS_ENUM_AUTOMATIC}.

avatar.description:
The resource linked to getUserAvatarImage()
Uploaded file can be one of the MIME types: [image/jpeg], and file size cannot exceed 512kb. Sets a custom avatar for
user accounts on ChromeOS.

customTermsOfService.description:
The resource linked to getTermsOfServiceUrl()
Uploaded file can be one of the MIME types: [text/plain], and file size cannot exceed 512kb. Allows an admin to set a
custom terms of service (TOS) for public sessions on ChromeOS.

deviceRestrictedManagedGuestSessionEnabl.description:
Enables Imprivata restricted managed guest session mode.

Default value: false.

managedGuestSessionAvailability.description:
Allows a managed guest session to be turned on, and the auto-launch time to be specified.

Default value: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_NOT_ALLOWED.

autoLaunchDelaySeconds.description:
Auto-launch delay. Number of seconds to delay before launching the managed guest session. During this time the sign-in screen will be visible.

Default value: 0

Dependencies: 

managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AUTO_LAUNCH
.

deviceHealthMonitoring.description:
Controls device health monitoring.

Default value: false

Dependencies: 

managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AUTO_LAUNCH
.

systemLogUploadEnabled.description:
Controls device system log upload.

Default value: false

Dependencies: 

managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AUTO_LAUNCH
.

displayRotation.description:
Screen Rotation (clockwise). Controls device screen rotation.

Default value: DISPLAY_ROTATION_ENUM_UNSET

Dependencies: 

managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AUTO_LAUNCH
.

userDisplayName.description:
Session name to display on login screen. Specifies the name of a managed guest session on the login screen.

Dependencies: 

managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_ALLOWED
managedGuestSessionAvailability: MANAGED_GUEST_SESSION_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AUTO_LAUNCH
.

restrictedManagedGuestSessionExtensionCl.description: Extension IDs. Enter a list of extension IDs. Each extension ID must be exactly 32 characters.

sessionDurationLimit.description:
Maximum session length. Specifies the maximum time that a user can be logged into a managed guest session.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 1

Max. value: 1440.

taskManagerEndProcessEnabled.description:
Controls whether users are allowed to end processes with the Chrome task manager.

Default value: true.

extensionManifestVTwoAvailability.description:
Manifest v2 extension availability.

Default value: EXTENSION_MANIFEST_V2_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_DEFAULT.

extensionExtendedBackgroundLifetimeForPo.description:
Origins that grant extended background lifetime to connecting extensions. Enter a list of origins. Extensions that
connect to one of these origins will be be kept running as long as the port is connected. One URL per line.

postQuantumKeyAgreementEnabled.description:
Controls whether or not Chrome will offer Kyber, a post-quantum key agreement algorithm, in TLS.

Default value: UNSET.

insecureHashesInTlsHandshakesEnabled.description:
Allow Chrome to use legacy insecure hashes during the TLS handshake process.

Default value: UNSET.

incognitoModeAvailability.description:
Controls the behavior of incognito mode for managed users in Chrome.

Default value: INCOGNITO_MODE_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_AVAILABLE.

browsingHistoryTtl.description:
Browsing history time to live (hours). Leave empty to never automatically remove browsing history.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 1.

downloadHistoryTtl.description:
Download history time to live (hours). Leave empty to never automatically remove download history.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 1.

cookiesAndOtherSiteDataTtl.description:
Cookies and other site data time to live (hours). Leave empty to never automatically remove cookies and other site data.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 1.

cachedImagesAndFilesTtl.description:
Cached images and files time to live (hours). Leave empty to never automatically remove cached images and files.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 1.

passwordSigninTtl.description:
Passwords and other sign-in data time to live (hours). Leave empty to never automatically remove passwords and other sign-in data.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 1.

autofillTtl.description:
Autofill form data time to live (hours). Leave empty to never automatically remove autofill form data.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 1.

siteSettingsTtl.description:
Site settings time to live (hours). Leave empty to never automatically remove site settings.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 1.

hostedAppDataTtl.description:
Hosted app data time to live (hours). Leave empty to never automatically remove hosted app data.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 1.

savingBrowserHistoryDisabled.description:
Controls whether managed users' browser histories are retained.

Default value: false.

schedulerConfiguration.description:
Controls whether Intel Hyper-Threading technology is disabled, or if all cores can be used without restrictions. Controls whether Intel Hyper-Threading technology is enabled on devices.

Default value: SCHEDULER_CONFIGURATION_ENUM_USER_CHOICE.

suppressUnsupportedOsWarning.description:
Suppresses the warning that appears when Google Chrome is running on an unsupported computer or operating system.

Default value: false.

overrideSecurityRestrictionsOnInsecureOr.description:
Origin or hostname patterns to ignore insecure origins security restrictions. Specifies the origin or hostname
patterns for which restrictions on insecure origins should not apply.

targetBlankImpliesNoOpener.description:
Controls whether pop-ups opened with a target of _blank can interact with the page that opened the pop-up.

Default value: true.

securityTokenSessionBehavior.description:
Action on security token removal (e.g. smart card). Specifies what happens when a user who is authenticating via a security token (e.g., with a smart card) removes that token while in a session.

Default value: SECURITY_TOKEN_SESSION_BEHAVIOR_ENUM_IGNORE.

securityTokenSessionNotificationSeconds.description:
Removal notification duration (seconds). A notification informing the user of the impending action is displayed for this many seconds. This notification blocks the screen. The action will only happen after this notification expires. The user can prevent the action by re-inserting the security token before the notification expires. Set to 0 to disable the notification and have the action happen immediately.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0

Max. value: 9999

Default value: 0

Dependencies: 

securityTokenSessionBehavior: SECURITY_TOKEN_SESSION_BEHAVIOR_ENUM_LOGOUT
securityTokenSessionBehavior: SECURITY_TOKEN_SESSION_BEHAVIOR_ENUM_LOCK
.

brightnessEnabled.description:
Controls whether initial scren brightness is set.

Default value: false.

brightnessAc.description:
Screen brightness (ac power). Specifies the screen brightness percent when running on AC power.

Min. value: 0

Max. value: 100

Dependencies: 

brightnessEnabled: true
.

brightnessBattery.description:
Screen brightness (battery power). Specifies the screen brightness percent when running on battery power.

Min. value: 0

Max. value: 100

Dependencies: 

brightnessEnabled: true
.

remoteDebuggingAllowed.description:
Controls whether users may use remote debugging by specifying "--remote-debugging-port" and "--remote-debugging-pipe" command line switches.

Default value: true.

displayCapturePermissionsPolicyEnabled.description:
Selections to allow insecure requests to access the display.

Default value: true.

webSqlInThirdPartyContextEnabled.description:
Selections for enabling WebSQL in third party contexts.

Default value: false.

webSqlNonSecureContextEnabled.description:
Forces WebSQL in non-secure contexts to be enabled.

Default value: false.

webSqlAccess.description:
Force WebSQL to be enabled.

Default value: false.

newBaseUrlInheritanceBehaviorAllowed.description:
Allows enabling the feature NewBaseUrlInheritanceBehavior.

Default value: true.

encryptedClientHelloEnabled.description:
Enable EncryptedClientHello (ECH), an extension to TLS to encrypt sensitive fields of the ClientHello and improve privacy.

Default value: true.

strictMimetypeCheckForWorkerScriptsEnabl.description:
Enables strict MIME checking for worker scripts.

Default value: true.

originAgentClusterDefaultEnabled.description:
The Origin-Agent-Cluster HTTP header controls whether a document is isolated in an origin-keyed agent cluster, or in a site-keyed agent cluster.

Default value: true.

fileOrDirectoryPickerWithoutGestureAllow.description:
Allow file or directory picker APIs to be called without prior user gesture. Urls to allow file or directory pickers
without user gesture.

screenCaptureWithoutGestureAllowedForOri.description: Allow screen capture without prior user gesture. Urls to allow screencapture without user gesture.

allowBackForwardCacheForCacheControlNoSt.description:
Allows pages with the header Cache-Control: no-store to be cached inthe back/forward cache.

Default value: true.

showLogoutButtonInTray.description:
Adds a logout button to the system tray.

Default value: true.

suggestLogoutAfterClosingLastWindow.description:
Controls whether the logout confirmation dialog is displayed.

Default value: true.

showHomeButton.description:
Controls whether the home button is always or never shown for a managed user, or if the user is allowed to configure whether it is.

Default value: UNSET.

homepageIsNewTabPage.description:
Controls whether the Chrome homepage is the new tab page, a page specified by a separate URL, or user-configured.

Default value: UNSET.

homepageLocation.description:
Homepage URL. Specifies the URL that should be used as the home page in managed Chrome.

Dependencies: 

homepageIsNewTabPage: FALSE
.

newTabPageLocation.description: New tab URL (leave empty for default). Specifies the URL of the page that should load when Chrome opens a new tab.

lensDesktopNtpSearchEnabled.description:
Enable showing Google Lens button in the search box when a new tab is opened.

Default value: true.

restoreOnStartupUrls.description:
Startup pages. Example: https://example.com.

Dependencies: 

restoreOnStartup: RESTORE_ON_STARTUP_ENUM_LIST_OF_URLS
restoreOnStartup: RESTORE_ON_STARTUP_ENUM_LIST_OF_URLS_AND_RESTORE_SESSION
.

restoreOnStartup.description:
Startup action. Governs which pages load on startup: a set list of URLs, the New Tab page, or a user-decided page.

Default value: RESTORE_ON_STARTUP_ENUM_UNSET.

startupBrowserWindowLaunchSuppressed.description:
Controls whether the Chrome browser is automatically launched on login.

Default value: false.

forceGoogleSafeSearch.description:
SafeSearch for Google Search queries. Specifies whether SafeSearch must be used for Google Search queries.

Default value: false.

forceYoutubeRestrictedMode.description:
Restricted Mode for YouTube. Specifies whether Restricted Mode must be used when accessing YouTube.

Default value: YOU_TUBE_RESTRICTION_ENUM_OFF.

disableScreenshots.description:
Controls whether a managed user can take screenshots on a ChromeOS device.

Default value: false.

screenCaptureAllowedByOrigins.description:
Allow tab, window, and desktop video capture by these sites. Sites set in this list will be ignored in the
'screenCaptureAllowed' field.

windowCaptureAllowedByOrigins.description:
Allow tab and window video capture by these sites. Sites set in this list will be ignored in the
'screenCaptureAllowedByOrigins' and 'screenCaptureAllowed' fields.

sameOriginTabCaptureAllowedByOrigins.description:
Allow tab video capture (same site only) by these sites. Sites set in this list will be ignored in the
'tabCaptureAllowedByOrigins', 'windowCaptureAllowedByOrigins',
'screenCaptureAllowedByOrigins', and 'screenCaptureAllowed' fields.

screenCaptureAllowed.description:
Controls whether sites are allowed to prompt the user to share a video stream of their screen.

Default value: true.

useMojoVideoDecoderForPepperAllowed.description:
Allow Pepper to use a new decoder for hardware accelerated video decoding.

Default value: true.

ppApiSharedImagesSwapChainAllowed.description:
Allow modern buffer allocation for Graphics3D APIs PPAPI plugin.

Default value: true.

intensiveWakeUpThrottlingEnabled.description:
Controls throttling behavior of background JavaScript timers.

Default value: UNSET.

unthrottledNestedTimeoutEnabled.description:
Controls behavior for climping of JavaScript setTimeout().

Default value: UNSET.

defaultJavaScriptJitSetting.description:
Controls whether sites are allowed to run JavaScript JIT.

Default value: DEFAULT_JAVA_SCRIPT_JIT_SETTING_ENUM_ALLOW_JAVA_SCRIPT_JIT.

javaScriptJitAllowedForSites.description: Allow JavaScript to use JIT on these sites. Specifies the site allowlist for JavaScript to use JIT.

javaScriptJitBlockedForSites.description:
Block JavaScript from using JIT on these sites. Specifies the site blocklist for JavaScript to be blocked from using. 
JIT.

defaultClipboardSetting.description:
Controls clipboard behavior for managed users in Chrome.

Default value: DEFAULT_CLIPBOARD_SETTING_ENUM_UNSET.

clipboardAllowedForUrls.description: Allow these sites to access the clipboard. Urls to allow clipboard access.

clipboardBlockedForUrls.description: Block these sites from accessing the clipboard. Urls to block clipboard access.

defaultNotificationsSetting.description:
Controls notifications behavior for managed users in Chrome.

Default value: DEFAULT_NOTIFICATIONS_SETTING_ENUM_UNSET.

notificationsAllowedForUrls.description:
Allow these sites to show notifications. Urls to allow notifications. Prefix domain with [*.] to include all
subdomains.Maximum of 1000 URLs. .

notificationsBlockedForUrls.description:
Block notifications on these sites. Urls to block notifications. Prefix domain with [*.] to include all
subdomains.Maximum of 1000 URLs. .

autoplayAllowlist.description:
Allowed URLs. URL patterns allowed to autoplay. Prefix domain with [*.] to include all subdomains. Use * to allow all
domains.

autoOpenAllowedForUrls.description:
Auto open URLs. If this policy is set, only downloads that match these URLs and have an auto open type will be auto
opened. If this policy is left unset, all downloads matching an auto open type will be auto opened. Wildcards
("*") are allowed when appended to a URL, but cannot be entered alone.

autoOpenFileTypes.description:
Auto open files types. Do not include the leading separator when listing the type. For example, use "txt",
not ".txt".

defaultPopupsSetting.description:
Controls behavior for pop-ups in Chrome.

Default value: DEFAULT_POPUPS_SETTING_ENUM_UNSET.

popupsAllowedForUrls.description: Allow pop-ups on these sites. Urls to allow pop-ups.

popupsBlockedForUrls.description: Block pop-ups on these sites. Urls to block pop-ups.

suppressCrossOriginIframeDialogs.description:
Controls whether JavaScript dialogs triggered from a cross-origin iframe are allowed or blocked.

Default value: true.

throttleNonVisibleCrossOriginIframesAllo.description:
Throttle non-visible, cross-origin iframes.

Default value: true.

sandboxExternalProtocolBlocked.description:
Controls whether navigation to external protocols inside a sandboxed iframe is allowed.

Default value: true.

urlBlocklist.description:
Blocked URLs. Any URL in this list will be blocked, unless it also appears in the list of exceptions specified in
'urlAllowlist'. Maximum of 1000 URLs. Note: to block OS and browser settings set the
'chrome.users.SystemFeaturesDisableList' policy instead of blocking 'chrome://' URLs.

urlAllowlist.description:
Blocked URL exceptions. Any URL that matches an entry in this exception list will be allowed, even if it matches an
entry in the blocked URLs. Wildcards ("*") are allowed when appended to a URL, but cannot be entered alone.
Maximum of 1000 URLs. .

showCastIconInToolbar.description:
Controls whether the Cast icon is always shown in the toolbar, or not shown in the toolbar by default subject to user choice.

Default value: false

Dependencies: 

enableMediaRouter: true
.

enableMediaRouter.description:
Allow users to Cast from Chrome. Controls whether managed users can use Google Cast in Chrome.

Default value: true.

showCastSessionsStartedByOtherDevices.description:
Media controls for Google Cast sessions started by other devices on the local network.

Default value: UNSET.

defaultInsecureContentSetting.description:
Controls whether all insecure content is blocked, or if it is allowed on some sites per user-added exceptions.

Default value: DEFAULT_INSECURE_CONTENT_SETTING_ENUM_BLOCK_INSECURE_CONTENT.

insecureContentAllowedForUrls.description: URL patterns to allow. Specifies which sites should allow insecure (HTTP) content to be shown.

insecureContentBlockedForUrls.description: URL patterns to block. Specifies which sites should block insecure (HTTP) content from being shown.

insecurePrivateNetworkRequestsAllowed.description:
Controls whether websites are allowed to make requests to more-private network endpoints in an insecure manner.

Default value: false.

insecurePrivateNetworkRequestsAllowedFor.description:
URL patterns to allow. Network requests to more-private endpoints, from insecure origins not covered by the patterns
specified here, will use the global default value.

insecureFormsWarningsEnabled.description:
Controls whether warnings are shown and autofill is disabled for insecure forms.

Default value: true.

prefixedStorageInfoEnabled.description:
Controls whether the non-standard API window.webkitStorageInfo is re-enabled, as it is deprecated and planned for removal.

Default value: false.

eventPathEnabled.description:
Controls the version availability of the non-standard API Event.path, which is being removed to improve web compatibility.

Default value: UNSET.

loadCryptoTokenExtension.description:
Options to enable the CryptoToken component until Chrome 107.

Default value: false.

networkFileSharesAllowed.description:
Wllows or blocks network file shares for managed users.

Default value: true.

netBiosShareDiscoveryEnabled.description:
Use the NetBIOS name query request protocol to discover shares on the network. Specifies whether the user can use. NetBIOS name query request protocol to discover shares on the network.

Default value: false

Dependencies: 

networkFileSharesAllowed: true
.

ntlmShareAuthenticationEnabled.description:
Use NTLM as an authentication protocol for SMB mounts. Controls whether the network file shares will use NTLM as an authentication protocol for SMB mounts.

Default value: false

Dependencies: 

networkFileSharesAllowed: true
.

networkFileSharesPreconfiguredShares.description:
Preconfigured network file shares.

Dependencies: 

networkFileSharesAllowed: true
.

scrollToTextFragmentEnabled.description:
Controls whether a managed user can follow links which scroll to a text fragment on a page.

Default value: true.

optimizationGuideFetchingEnabled.description:
Enables or disables fetching of page load metadata and machine learning models that enhance the browsing experience.

Default value: true.

appCacheForceEnabled.description:
Enable AppCache - a deprecated web feature allowing websites to save data offline.

Default value: false.

pdfLocalFileAccessAllowedForDomains.description: Allowed URLs. List of file URLs with local access enabled in the PDF viewer.

trashEnabled.description:
Enable the capability to send files to the trash (on supported filesystems) in the Google ChromeOS Files app.

Default value: true.

nativeClientForceAllowed.description:
Controls whether or not the Native Client can be force enabled even if the default behavior would otherwise disable it.

Default value: false.

shoppingListEnabled.description:
Enables or disables the shopping list feature, which will present users with UI to track the price of the product displayed on the current page.

Default value: true.

forceEnablePepperVideoDecoderDevApi.description:
Force enable support for the PPB_VideoDecoder(Dev) API.

Default value: false.

defaultThirdPartyStoragePartitioningSett.description:
Allows or blocks third-party storage partitioning by default.

Default value: DEFAULT_THIRD_PARTY_STORAGE_PARTITIONING_SETTING_ENUM_ALLOW_PARTITIONING.

thirdPartyStoragePartitioningBlockedForO.description:
Block third-party storage partitioning for these origins. Specifies top-level origins which block third-party storage partitioning.

Dependencies: 

defaultThirdPartyStoragePartitioningSetting: DEFAULT_THIRD_PARTY_STORAGE_PARTITIONING_SETTING_ENUM_ALLOW_PARTITIONING
.

pdfUseSkiaRendererEnabled.description:
Controls whether the PDF viewer in Google Chrome uses Skia renderer. When this policy is enabled, the PDF viewer uses. Skia renderer. When this policy is disabled, the PDF viewer uses its current AGG renderer. When this policy is not set, the PDF renderer will be chosen by the browser.

Default value: UNSET.

bookmarkBarEnabled.description:
Controls the behavior of the bookmark bar in Chrome.

Default value: UNSET.

shelfAlignmentMgs.description:
Controls the position of the shelf in the ChromeOS UI during Managed Guest Sessions.

Default value: SHELF_ALIGNMENT_MGS_ENUM_BOTTOM.

promptForDownloadLocation.description:
Controls whether users are asked where to save each file before downloading.

Default value: UNSET.

downloadBubbleEnabled.description:
Enables the download bubble UI in Google Chrome.

Default value: true.

spellCheckServiceEnabled.description:
Enables or disables the spell checking web service.

Default value: UNSET.

translateEnabled.description:
Controls whether Google Translate services in Chrome are on or off.

Default value: UNSET.

developerToolsAvailability.description:
Controls whether users can use Chrome developer tools.

Default value: DEVELOPER_TOOLS_AVAILABILITY_ENUM_ALLOW_DEVELOPER_TOOLS_EXCEPT_FORCE_INSTALLED.

autofillAddressEnabled.description:
Controls whether AutoFill for addresses is enabled.

Default value: true.

autofillCreditCardEnabled.description:
Controls whether AutoFill for credit cards is enabled.

Default value: true.

paymentMethodQueryEnabled.description:
Allows websites to query for available payment methods.

Default value: true.

physicalKeyboardPredictiveWriting.description:
Enables or disables the predictive writing feature for physical keyboards.

Default value: true.

physicalKeyboardAutocorrect.description:
Enables or disables the autocorrect feature on the physical keyboard.

Default value: true.

emojiPickerGifSupportEnabled.description:
If this policy is unset, GIF emoji will be disabled for users on managed ChromeOS devices and enabled for normal users.

Default value: UNSET.

emojiSuggestionEnabled.description:
Enables Emoji Suggestion.

Default value: false.

unifiedDesktopEnabledByDefault.description:
Configures Unified Desktop on ChromeOS devices, a feature that allows open ChromeOS apps to span multiple monitors.

Default value: false.

assistantWebEnabled.description:
Allows the use of Google Assistant on the web, e.g. to enable changing passwords automatically.

Default value: UNSET.

quickAnswersEnabled.description:
Enables or disables Quick Answers.

Default value: true.

quickAnswersDefinitionEnabled.description:
Gives Quick Answers permission to access selected content and send the info to the server to get definition results.

Default value: true

Dependencies: 

quickAnswersEnabled: true
.

quickAnswersTranslationEnabled.description:
Gives Quick Answers permission to access selected content and send the info to the server to get definition results.

Default value: true

Dependencies: 

quickAnswersEnabled: true
.

quickAnswersUnitConversionEnabled.description:
Gives Quick Answers permission to access selected content and send the info to the server to get unit conversion results.

Default value: true

Dependencies: 

quickAnswersEnabled: true
.

systemFeaturesDisableMode.description:
Sets the user experience of disabled features.

Default value: SYSTEM_FEATURES_DISABLE_MODE_ENUM_BLOCKED.

allowDinosaurEasterEgg.description:
Controls whether the Chrome dinosaur game is allowed.

Default value: UNSET.

userBorealisAllowed.description:
Allows users to user Borealis on Google ChromeOS.

Default value: false.

appRecommendationZeroStateEnabled.description:
Enable recommendations in the launcher for apps that have been previously installed by the user on other devices.

Default value: false.

suggestedContentEnabled.description:
Enables or disables suggested content.

Default value: false.

showFullUrlsInAddressBar.description:
Enables the display of the full URL in the address bar.

Default value: UNSET.

fullscreenAllowed.description:
Allows fullscreen mode.

Default value: true.

keepFullscreenWithoutNotificationUrlAllo.description: Keep full screen after unlock without warning for the following URLs. Enter a list of URL patterns, one per line.

forceMaximizeOnFirstRun.description:
Controls whether Chrome maximizes the first window shown on first run.

Default value: false.

userFeedbackAllowed.description:
Allows user feedback.

Default value: true.

deviceAllowMgsToStoreDisplayProperties.description:
Allows Managed Guest Session to persist display properties.

Default value: false.

lensRegionSearchEnabled.description:
Allows Google Lens region search menu item to be shown in context menu if supported.

Default value: true.

lockIconInAddressBarEnabled.description:
Sets the icon used for secure connections.

Default value: false.

urlParamFilterEnabled.description:
Allows filtering of URL parameters in the browser.

Default value: true.

osColorMode.description:
Controls theme used to render UI during OOBE and in session (dark/light/auto).

Default value: OS_COLOR_MODE_ENUM_LIGHT.

searchSuggestEnabled.description:
Controls whether or not users are allowed to use Search Suggest, or if they can configure it themselves in Chrome.

Default value: UNSET.

googleSearchSidePanelEnabled.description:
If set to enabled Side Panel search is allowed on all web pages. If set to disabled, Side Panel search is not available on any webpage.

Default value: true.

externalStorageDevices.description:
Secure Digital (SD) cards, USB flash drive devices, and MTP devices. Controls whether users are allowed to use external storage devices.

Default value: EXTERNAL_STORAGE_ENUM_READ_WRITE.

defaultWebUsbGuardSetting.description:
Can web sites ask for access to connected USB devices. Specifies the level of access that websites have over connected USB devices.

Default value: DEFAULT_WEB_USB_GUARD_SETTING_ENUM_UNSET.

webUsbAskForUrls.description:
Allow these sites to ask for USB access. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see URL patterns at
https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard is
not valid.

webUsbBlockedForUrls.description:
Block these sites from asking for USB access. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see URL patterns
at https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard
is not valid.

webUsbAllowDevicesForUrls.description:
Allows automatically granting permissions to specific sites to connect to USB devices with the given vendor and
product IDs via the WebUSB API.

audioCaptureAllowed.description:
Microphone and audio input. Controls whether audio input (not just from the built-in microphone) is disabled or if users are prompted to allow it each time.

Default value: true.

audioCaptureAllowedUrls.description:
URL patterns to allow. URLs that will be granted access to the audio input device without a prompt. Prefix domain
with [*.] to include subdomains.

audioOutputAllowed.description:
Speakers and audio output. Enables or disables audio output.

Default value: true.

videoCaptureAllowed.description:
Enables or disables camera input for websites and apps.

Default value: true.

videoCaptureAllowedUrls.description:
URL patterns to allow. URLs that will be granted access to the video input device without a prompt. Prefix domain
with [*.] to include subdomains.

keyboardDefaultToFunctionKeys.description:
Top-row key behavior. Configures whether the top keyboard row is treated as function (F1-F12) or media keys.

Default value: false.

defaultSerialGuardSetting.description:
Control use of the Web Serial API. Specifies the level of access for websites requiring control of the serial ports.

Default value: DEFAULT_SERIAL_GUARD_SETTING_ENUM_UNSET.

serialAskForUrls.description:
Allow the Web Serial API on these sites. List of URLs that specify websites that will be allowed to ask users to
grant them access to the serial ports. Prefix domain with [*.] to include subdomains.

serialBlockedForUrls.description:
Block the Web Serial API on these sites. List of URLs patterns that specify which websites can't ask users to
grant them access to a serial port. Prefix domain with [*.] to include subdomains.

serialAllowUsbDevicesForUrls.description:
Allows automatically granting permissions to specific sites to connect to serial devices with the given vendor and
product IDs.

privacyScreenEnabled.description:
This setting is only supported on devices with an electronic privacy screen.

Default value: UNSET.

defaultFileSystemReadGuardSetting.description:
Controls use of the File System API for reading.

Default value: DEFAULT_FILE_SYSTEM_READ_GUARD_SETTING_ENUM_UNSET.

fileSystemReadAskForUrls.description:
Allow file system read access on these sites. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see URL patterns
at https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard
is not valid.

fileSystemReadBlockedForUrls.description:
Block read access on these sites. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see URL patterns at
https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard is
not valid.

fileSystemSyncAccessHandleAsyncInterface.description:
Re-enables the deprecated asynchronous interface for FileSystemSyncAccessHandle in File System Access API.

Default value: false.

defaultSensorsSetting.description:
Default access. This default access applies for sites that don't match a URL defined in 'sensorsAllowedForUrls' or 'sensorsBlockedForUrls'. Sensors may include motion and light.

Default value: DEFAULT_SENSORS_SETTING_ENUM_UNSET.

sensorsAllowedForUrls.description:
Allow access to sensors on these sites. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see
https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns. Note: using only the "*" wildcard is
not valid.

sensorsBlockedForUrls.description:
Block access to sensors on these sites. For detailed information on valid url patterns, please see
https://cloud.google.com/docs/chrome-enterprise/policies/url-patterns Note: using only the "*" wildcard is
not valid.

enterpriseHardwarePlatformApiEnabled.description:
Enables managed extensions to use the Enterprise Hardware Platform API.

Default value: false.

usbDetectorNotificationEnabled.description:
Enable USB device detected notifications.

Default value: true.

safeBrowsingProtectionLevel.description:
Safe Browsing Protection Level. Sets the protection level for Safe Browsing: user-chosen, disabled, standard mode, or enhanced mode.

Default value: SAFE_BROWSING_PROTECTION_LEVEL_ENUM_USER_CHOICE.

safeBrowsingProxiedRealTimeChecksAllowed.description:
Allow Safe Browsing's standard protection mode to send partial hashes of URLs to Google. This controls whether. Safe Browsing's standard protection mode is allowed to send partial hashes of URLs to Google.

Default value: true

Dependencies: 

safeBrowsingProtectionLevel: SAFE_BROWSING_PROTECTION_LEVEL_ENUM_USER_CHOICE
safeBrowsingProtectionLevel: SAFE_BROWSING_PROTECTION_LEVEL_ENUM_STANDARD_PROTECTION
.

safeBrowsingDownloadRestrictions.description:
Allow Google Chrome to prevent certain types of downloads (known to be dangerous or potentially dangerous).

Default value: DOWNLOAD_RESTRICTION_ENUM_NO_SPECIAL_RESTRICTIONS.

disableSafeBrowsingProceedAnyway.description:
Option to disable bypassing of safe browsing warnings.

Default value: false.

safeSitesFilterBehavior.description:
Enables or disables the filtering of top-level sites (but not embedded iframes) for adult content.

Default value: SAFE_SITES_FILTER_BEHAVIOR_ENUM_SAFE_SITES_FILTER_DISABLED.

lookalikeWarningAllowlistDomains.description: Allowlisted Domains. Enter list of domains where Chrome should prevent the display of lookalike URL warnings.

adsSettingForIntrusiveAdsSites.description:
Controls whether ads are allowed on all sites, or blocked on sites with intrusive ads.

Default value: ADS_SETTING_FOR_INTRUSIVE_ADS_SITES_ENUM_ALLOW_ADS.

abusiveExperienceInterventionEnforce.description:
Controls whether sites with abusive experiences are prevented from opening new windows or tabs.

Default value: true.

allowWakeLocks.description:
Enables or disables wake locks for power management.

Default value: true.

allowScreenWakeLocks.description:
Screen wake locks. Enables or disables screen wake locks for power management.

Default value: true

Dependencies: 

allowWakeLocks: true
.

idleWarningDelayAc.description:
AC idle warning delay in seconds. The warning appears only if the idle action is logout or shutdown. Enter zero to never show an idle warning. Leave empty for system default.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

lidCloseAction.description:
Action on lid close. Selects the action the device should take when the lid is closed.

Default value: LID_CLOSE_ACTION_ENUM_LOGOUT.

idleDelayAc.description:
AC idle delay in seconds. Enter zero to never take the idle action. Leave empty for system default.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

idleActionAc.description:
AC idle action. Selects what action the device should take once it is considered idle when connected to power.

Default value: IDLE_ACTION_AC_ENUM_SLEEP.

screenDimDelayAc.description:
AC screen dim delay in seconds. Enter zero to never dim the screen. Leave empty for system default. Does not affect screen dim on lock screen.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

screenOffDelayAc.description:
AC screen off delay in seconds. Enter zero to never turn off the screen. Leave empty for system default. Does not affect screen off on lock screen.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

screenLockDelayAc.description:
AC screen lock delay in seconds. Enter zero to never lock the screen on idle. Leave empty for system default.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

idleDelayBattery.description:
Battery idle delay in seconds. Enter zero to never take the idle action. Other idle delays will be clamped to this one. Leave empty for system default.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

idleWarningDelayBattery.description:
Battery idle warning delay in seconds. The warning appears only if the idle action is logout or shutdown. Enter zero to never show an idle warning. Leave empty for system default.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

idleActionBattery.description:
Battery idle action. Selects what action the device should take once it is considered idle when connected to power.

Default value: IDLE_ACTION_BATTERY_ENUM_SLEEP.

screenDimDelayBattery.description:
Battery screen dim delay in seconds. Enter zero to never dim the screen. Leave empty for system default. Does not affect screen dim on lock screen.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

screenOffDelayBattery.description:
Battery screen off delay in seconds. Enter zero to never turn off the screen. Leave empty for system default. Does not affect screen off on lock screen.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

screenLockDelayBattery.description:
Battery screen lock delay in seconds. Enter zero to never lock the screen on idle. Leave empty for system default.

The Relution API expects all ChromeOS NullableDurations to be converted to milliseconds

Min. value: 0.

lockOnSleepOrLidClose.description:
Lock screen on sleep or lid close. Before Chrome 106, only sleep will trigger locking. In Chrome 106+, sleep or lid close will trigger locking.

Default value: UNSET.

allowForChromeDevices.description:
Chromebooks (by device). Allow managed devices to use the wifi network.

Default value: false.

allowForChromeUsers.description:
Chromebooks (by user). Allow managed users to use the wifi network.

Default value: false.

details.description:
Wifi network configuration.

Default value: {ssid=REQUIRED - Replace with your SSID, hiddenSsid=false, automaticallyConnect=false, security=None, proxySettings={type=Direct}, allowIpConfiguration=false, allowNameServersConfiguration=false, nameServerSelection=NAME_SERVERS_ENUM_AUTOMATIC}.

uuid.description: Return unique identifier for domain object.

payloadUuid.description:
identifier used to associate the Configuration affected.

The additional key is needed as the creation of new policy versions clones the configurations assigning new keys.
To uniquely recognize configuration data across policy versions this value may be used. A suitable candidate
value is the key of the configuration when it is first created.

ComplianceViolation.description:
indicates some configuration mismatch related to a device and optionally to a policy configuration.

Usually the following requirements hold but are not strictly enforced:

  • there can be only one CV for a combination of:
    • device + type + configuration
    • device + type (if there is no configuration)
  • if a device has a configuration, it should have also a CV for it
.

supported.description: it will only be applied on the device if supported is true.

ContentCachingRange.description: List of system preference panes as described in Content Caching Range Can be selected in MacOSSystemPreferencesConfiguration.

userUninstallSettings.description: Specifies if a user is allowed to uninstall the custom app.

CustomPermissionGrant.description:
Defines the action to be taken by the operating system when an app requests a custom Android permission, which
must be a runtime permission (i.e. a "dangerous" permission).

DefaultPermissionGrant.description: Defines the action to be taken by the operating system when an app requests a well-known Android permission.

deviceGroupPolicyInfos.description: device groups assigning the policies, if the client is authorized to read device groups.

DeviceCompliance.description: Aggregated compliance information for a device.

uuid.description: Return unique identifier for domain object.

enrollmentUrls.description: Client enrollment URLs. Set the client enrollment URLs of the certificate pattern.

issuer.description: Issuer pattern. Sets the issuer pattern of the certificate pattern.

subject.description: Subject pattern. Sets the subject pattern of the certificate pattern.

outerProtocol.description:
Outer protocol. Sets the outer extensible authentication protocol.

Required fields: 

For values: PEAP; Required: innerProtocol, useSystemCas. 
For values: EAP-TLS; Required: tlsVersionMax, useSystemCas
For values: EAP-TTLS; Required: innerProtocol, useSystemCas
.

innerProtocol.description:
Inner protocol. Sets the inner extensible authentication protocol.

Dependencies: 

outerProtocol: PEAP
outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS
.

useSystemCas.description:
Allows using Server Certificate Authorities.

Dependencies: 

outerProtocol: PEAP
outerProtocol: EAP-TLS
outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS
.

clientCertPattern.description:
SCEP Profile. Sets the SCEP Profile.

Dependencies: 

outerProtocol: EAP-TLS
.

identity.description:
Username. Sets the username of the EAP.

Dependencies: 

outerProtocol: PEAP
outerProtocol: LEAP
outerProtocol: EAP-TLS
outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS
outerProtocol: EAP-PWD
.

password.description:
Password. Sets the password of the EAP. Omit from requests to retain current value, set to "" to clear the value.

Dependencies: 

outerProtocol: PEAP
outerProtocol: LEAP
outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS
outerProtocol: EAP-PWD
.

anonymousIdentity.description:
Outer identity. Sets the outer identity of the EAP.

Dependencies: 

outerProtocol: PEAP
outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS
.

tlsVersionMax.description:
Maximum TLS version. Sets the maximum TLS version of the EAP.

Dependencies: 

outerProtocol: EAP-TLS
.

serverCaRef.description:
Server Certificate Authority. Sets the Server Certificate Authority.

Dependencies: 

useSystemCas: false
.

domainSuffixMatch.description:
Server certificate domain suffix match. Sets constraints on the suffix of the domain name in server certificate.

Dependencies: 

outerProtocol: PEAP
outerProtocol: EAP-TLS
outerProtocol: EAP-TTLS
.

commonName.description: Common name. Sets the common name of the certificate pattern.

locality.description: Locality. Sets the locality of the certificate pattern.

organization.description: Organization. Sets the organization of the certificate pattern.

organizationalUnit.description: Organizational unit. Sets the organizational unit of the certificate pattern.

httpProxy.description: HTTP proxy. Sets the HTTP proxy.

secureHttpProxy.description: Secure proxy. Sets the Secure proxy.

ftpProxy.description: FTP proxy. Sets the FTP proxy.

socks.description:
SOCKS proxy. Sets the SOCKS proxy.

Required fields: 

Required: socks.host, socks.port
.

authentication.description:
Authentication. Sets the authentication type of the ethernet network.

Required fields: 

For values: 8021X; Required: eap.outerProtocol
.

eap.description:
Extensible Authentication Protocol. Only affects Enterprise (802.1X) authentication types.

Dependencies: 

authentication: 8021X
.

proxySettings.description: Set the proxy settings for this network. .

allowIpConfiguration.description: IP settings. Allow IP address to be configured on the device (ChromeOS only).

allowNameServersConfiguration.description: Allow name servers to be configured on the device.

nameServerSelection.description:
Selection to determine where name servers will come from.

Required fields: 

For values: NAME_SERVERS_ENUM_CUSTOM; Required: customNameServers
.

customNameServers.description:
Custom name servers. Sets domain values in custom name servers.

Dependencies: 

nameServerSelection: NAME_SERVERS_ENUM_CUSTOM
.

name.description: Name. Ethernet network name.

host.description: Host. Sets the host of the proxy setting.

port.description: Port. Sets the port of the proxy setting.

type.description:
Proxy Type. Sets the proxy type of the network.

Required fields: 

For values: Manual; Required: manualConfiguration. 
For values: PAC; Required: automaticProxyConfigurationUrl
.

manualConfiguration.description:
Sets the Manual proxy configuration.

Dependencies: 

type: Manual

Required fields: 

Required: manualConfiguration.socks
.

excludeDomains.description:
Domains with no proxy. Sets the domains with no proxy in manual proxy configuration.

Dependencies: 

type: Manual
.

automaticProxyConfigurationUrl.description:
Autoconfiguration URL. Sets the autoconfiguration URL in automatic proxy configuration.

Dependencies: 

type: PAC
.

fontUuid.description: Reference to font which is set on payload generation.

templateUuid.description:
References a CertificateTemplate. If the configuration gets applied on a
device, this reference will be resolved and the identityCertificate will be filled
by an issued certificate of this CertificateTemplate.

templateType.description:
Represents the type of CertificateTemplate and indicates that certificate will be initialized
automatically for CERTIFICATE, but stays null for others.

certificate.description:
The Certificate is stored as a json string in the database.
If someone would delete the certificate, this configuration would not be updated. 
Therefore its not possible to delete the certificate via the portal ui.

sensor.description:
single optional sensor to retrieve the last value from.
The formula is calculated on this last value.

whitelistAllRequiredApps.description: Automatically whitelist all required apps of the app compliance (regardless of shared device or not).

whitelistAllAutoDeployedApps.description: Automatically whitelist all auto-deployed apps of the user (regardless of shared device or not).

removeAllAutoDeployedRequiredApps.description: Automatically remove all auto-deployed apps isAutoDeploy() if not required app anymore.

whitelistWebClips.description: Which (if any) web clips should be whitelisted.

whitelistLocalSecretPrompts.description: Allows local secret prompts, including Google logins (via SLGoogleAuth) and iCloud login.

whitelistedApps.description: Black or whitelist according to isBlacklist value.

appBundleIdentifier.description: The bundle identifier of the app containing the DNS proxy network extension.

providerBundleIdentifier.description:
The bundle identifier of the DNS proxy network extension to use.
Declaring the bundle identifier is useful for apps that contain more than one DNS proxy extension.

name.description: The displayName of the user.

givenName.description: The given name of the user.

appleID.description: The apple id of the user.

imageURL.description: The url to the profile image.

smimeSigningEnabled.description: If set to `true`, S/MIME signing is enabled for this account.

smimeSigningUserOverrideable.description: If set to `true`, the user can toggle S/MIME signing on or off in Settings.

smimeSigningCertificateUsage.description:
When USER the per-user. 
UserCertificate of subtype
SMIME_SIGNING is used for
mail signatures.

smimeSigningCertificate.description: The identity certificate used to sign messages sent from this account.

smimeSigningCertificateUUIDUserOverridea.description: If set to `true`, the user can select the signing identity.

smimeEncryptByDefault.description:
If set to `true`, S/MIME encryption is enabled by default. If smimeEnablePerMessageSwitch is
`false`, this default cannot be changed by the user.

smimeEnablePerMessageSwitch.description: If `true`, displays the per-message encryption switch in the Mail Compose UI.

smimeEncryptByDefaultUserOverrideable.description: If set to `true`, the user can toggle the encryption by default setting.

smimeEncryptionCertificateUsage.description:
When USER the per-user. 
UserCertificate of subtype
SMIME_ENCRYPTION is used for
mail encryption.

smimeEncryptionCertificate.description:
The identity certificate used to decrypt messages sent to this account.
The public certificate is attached to outgoing mail to allow encrypted mail to be sent to this user.
When the user sends encrypted mail, the public certificate is used to encrypt the copy of the mail in their Sent
mailbox.

smimeEncryptionCertificateUUIDUserOverri.description: If set to `true`, the user can select the S/MIME encryption identity and encryption is enabled.

enableCalendars.description:
If false, disables the Calendars service for this account. The Calendars service may be re-enabled in Settings
unless EnableCalendarsUserOverridable is false.n
EnableMail, EnableContacts, EnableCalendars, EnableReminders, and EnableNotes can't all be set to false.n
Default: true.

enableCalendarsUserOverridable.description:
If false, prevents the user from changing the state of the Calendars service for this account in Settings.n
Default: true.

enableMail.description:
If false, disables the Mail service for this account. The Mail service may be re-enabled in Settings unless. 
EnableMailUserOverridable is false.n
EnableMail, EnableContacts, EnableCalendars, EnableReminders, and EnableNotes can't all be set to false.n
Default: true.

enableMailUserOverridable.description:
If false, prevents the user from changing the state of the Mail service for this account in Settings.n
Default: true.

enableNotes.description:
If false, disables the Notes service for this account. The Notes service may be re-enabled in Settings unless. 
EnableNotesUserOverridable is false.n
EnableMail, EnableContacts, EnableCalendars, EnableReminders, and EnableNotes can't all be set to false.n
Default: true.

enableNotesUserOverridable.description:
If false, prevents the user from changing the state of the Notes service for this account in Settings.n
Default: true.

enableReminders.description:
If false, disables the Reminders service for this account. The Reminders service may be re-enabled in Settings
unless EnableRemindersUserOverridable is false.n
EnableMail, EnableContacts, EnableCalendars, EnableReminders, and EnableNotes can't all be set to false.n
Default: true.

enableRemindersUserOverridable.description:
If false, prevents the user from changing the state of the Reminders service for this account in Settings.n
Default: true.

enableContacts.description:
If false, disables the Contacts service for this account. The Contacts service may be re-enabled in Settings
unless EnableContactsUserOverridable is false.n
EnableMail, EnableContacts, EnableCalendars, EnableReminders, and EnableNotes can't all be set to false.n
Default: true.

enableContactsUserOverridable.description:
If false, prevents the user from changing the state of the Contacts service for this account in Settings.n
Default: true.

smimeSigningEnabled.description: If set to `true`, S/MIME signing is enabled for this account.

smimeSigningUserOverrideable.description: If set to `true`, the user can toggle S/MIME signing on or off in Settings.

smimeSigningCertificateUsage.description:
When USER the per-user. 
UserCertificate of subtype
SMIME_SIGNING is used for
mail signatures.

mail encryption.

oAuth.description:
Specifies whether the connection should use OAuth for authentication. If enabled, a password should not be
specified.

defaultAudioCallApp.description: package name of app used as DefaultServiceHandlers AudioCall.

removeMediaOnRemoval.description:
if this boolean is true, the managed media in this configuration will be deleted
from the device if the config is removed from the device.

startTime.description: The start time when the devices should be locked due to lost mode activation.

endTime.description: The end time when a device should be unlocked due to lost mode deactivation.

minutesUntilFailedLoginReset.description:
On macOS, this can be set to the number of minutes before the login will be reset after the maxFailedAttempts
unsuccessful attempts has been reached.
This key requires setting maxFailedAttempts.
macOS 10.10+

deniedICCIDsForRCS.description:
An array of strings representing ICCIDs of cellular plans.
The device prevents use of any matching cellular networks with RCS messaging.
The array must contain no more than 4 ICCID strings.

deniedICCIDsForiMessageFaceTime.description:
An array of strings representing ICCIDs of cellular plans.
The device prevents use of any matching cellular networks in iMessage and FaceTime.
The array must contain no more than 4 ICCID strings.

allowVideoConferencingRemoteControl.description:
If false, disables the ability for a remote FaceTime session to request control of the device.
Available in iOS 18.4 and later on supervised devices.

allowDefaultMessagingAppModification.description:
If false, disables default messaging app preference modification.
The MDM Settings command to set the default messaging app preference still works when this is applied.
Available in iOS 18.4 and later.

allowDefaultCallingAppModification.description:
If false, disables default calling app preference modification.
The MDM Settings command to set the default calling app preference still works when this is applied.
Available in iOS 18.4 and later.

allowSafariSummary.description:
If false, the system disables the ability to summarize content in Safari.
Available in iOS 18.2 and later.

allowMailSmartReplies.description:
If false, disables smart replies in Mail.
Available in iOS 18.2.

allowAppleIntelligenceReport.description:
If false, the system disables Apple Intelligence reports.
Available in iOS 18.4.

allowVisualIntelligenceSummary.description:
If false, the system disables visual intelligence summarization.
Available in iOS 18.3 and later.

allowSatelliteConnection.description:
If false, the system prohibits the connection to and use of satellite services.
Available in iOS 18.2 and later.

allowNotesTranscription.description:
If false, disables transcription in Notes.
Available in iOS 18.2 and later.

allowNotesTranscriptionSummary.description:
If false, disables transcription summarization in Notes.
Available in iOS 18.3.

allowedExternalIntelligenceWorkspaceIDs.description:
An array of strings, but currently restricted to a single element.
If present, Apple Intelligence only allows the given external integration workspace ID to be used, and requires a
sign-in to make requests.
The user will be required to sign in to integrations that support signing in.
Multiple payloads combine using an intersect operation.
This means the allowed set of workspace IDs can become the empty set if conflicting values are specified in multiple
payloads.
Supervised devices with iOS 18.3 or later.

allowDefaultBrowserModification.description:
If false, disables default browser preference modification.
The MDM Settings command to set the default browser preference will still work when this is applied.
Available in iOS 18.2 and later.

allowAddingGameCenterFriends.description:
If false, the system prohibits adding friends to Game Center.
Available in iOS 4.2.1 and later, and macOS 10.13 and later.
Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later.
Default: true.

allowCloudPrivateRelay.description:
If false, the system disables iCloud Private Relay.
Available in iOS 15 and later, and in macOS 12 and later.
Requires a supervised device in iOS.
Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices and with managed Apple IDs is deprecated.
Default: true.

allowFindMyFriendsModification.description:
If false, the system disables changes to Find My Friends.
Requires a supervised device.
Available in iOS 7 and later.
Default: true.

allowFingerprintModification.description:
If false, the system prevents the user from modifying Touch ID or Face ID.
Available in iOS 8.3 and later, and macOS 14 and later.
Requires a supervised device in iOS.
Default: true.

allowNFC.description:
If false, the system disables NFC.
Requires a supervised device.
Available in iOS 14.2 and later.
Default: true.

allowCamera.description:
If false, disables the camera, and its icon is removed from the Home screen. Users are unable to take
photographs. As of iOS 13, requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 4 and later, and macOS 10.11 and
later.n
Default: true.

allowVideoConferencing.description:
If false, disables video conferencing. As of iOS 13, requires a supervised device. Available in iOS 4 and
later.n
Default: true.

forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses.description:
If true, automatically gives permission to the teacher's requests without prompting the student. Requires a supervised device.

Version: iOS 11+

Default: false.

forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveCl.description:
If true, a student enrolled in an unmanaged course through Classroom requests permission from the teacher when attempting to leave the course. Requires a supervised device.

Version: iOS 11.3+

Default: false.

forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock.description:
